## Type `SimpleServicesMarketDataSourceInput`

**Kind:** `INPUT_OBJECT`

Source of market data for Simple Services enrollment.

Exactly one of the following must be provided:
- quoted_supply_point_data: Use a pre-created QuotedSupplyPoint
- product_catalog_data: Use product catalog characteristics
- agreement_transfer_data: Transfer existing agreements from another account

| Input field | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `quotedSupplyPointData` | `SimpleServicesQuotedSupplyPointInput` | Data for enrollment using a pre-created QuotedSupplyPoint. |
| `productCatalogData` | `SimpleServicesProductCatalogInput` | Data for enrollment using product catalog characteristics. |
| `agreementTransferData` | `SimpleServicesAgreementTransferInput` | Data for enrollment via agreement transfer. Callers must include an associated account number and product code. If the account spans multiple properties, the group header property identifies the target property. |

## Type `SimpleServicesProductCatalogInput`

**Kind:** `INPUT_OBJECT`

| Input field | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `product` | `String!` | The code of the product to be enrolled. |
| `ratesAgreedAt` | `DateTime` | The datetime when the rates of the product were agreed. This is usually the datetime corresponding to when the quote/offer was generated. |
| `productCharacteristicsList` | `[CharacteristicValueInput]` | List of product characteristics for the selected product. |
| `supplyPointCharacteristicsList` | `[CharacteristicValueInput]` | List of supply point characteristics. |
| `monthlyPaymentAmount` | `Int` | The monthly payment amount to set for a regular payment schedule. |

**Kind:** `INPUT_OBJECT`

| Input field | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `quotedSupplyPointId` | `ID!` | The id of the QuotedSupplyPoint created for the supply point. |

## Type `StorePaymentInstructionInput`

**Kind:** `INPUT_OBJECT`

The input for storing a new payment instruction created through the embedded process.

| Input field | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `accountNumber` | `String!` | The account number. |
| `instructionType` | `PaymentType!` | The type of the new payment instruction. |
| `validFrom` | `DateTime` | The datetime from which the instruction is vaild. If not specified, defaults to the current datetime. |
| `vendorReference` | `String!` | The vendor's reference for this payment method. |
| `ledgerId` | `String` | The ID of the ledger to which the instructions will be linked. Deprecated: The 'ledgerId' field is deprecated. Please use 'ledgerNumber' instead. This is in the form of 'L-123456789A' - Marked as deprecated on 2024-10-22. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-06-25. |
| `ledgerNumber` | `String` | **WARNING: Will be mandatory in future versions** The number of the ledger to which the instructions will be linked. |
| `useForAutomatedPayments` | `Boolean` | Set newly created payment instruction as the active payment preference. |

## Type `SuccessfulPaymentDetailsInput`

**Kind:** `INPUT_OBJECT`

| Input field | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `actionIntent` | `PaymentActionIntentOneOfInput!` | The payment action intent details that identify the target for this payment. |
| `reference` | `String!` | The reference used to uniquely identify this payment. |
| `amount` | `Int!` | The payment amount in the minor unit of currency. |
| `paymentDate` | `Date!` | The date when the payment was made. |
| `customerReference` | `String!` | The description of the payment, as shown to the customer. |
| `paymentMethod` | `PaymentMethodInput!` | The details of the payment method used for this payment. |
| `timestamp` | `DateTime!` | The timezone aware datetime when the payment entered the reported state. |
| `succeededAt` | `DateTime!` | The timezone aware datetime when the payment succeeded. |

## Type `SupplyPointTaxAdjustmentInput`

**Kind:** `INPUT_OBJECT`

Input type for a supply point tax adjustment.

| Input field | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `supplyPointId` | `ID!` | The ID of the supply point. |
| `taxCategory` | `String!` | The tax category for this adjustment. |
| `taxSubcategory` | `String` | The tax subcategory for this adjustment. |
| `qualifyingUsage` | `Decimal!` | The proportion of usage that qualifies for the adjustment (0-1). |
| `adjustmentType` | `String!` | The type of tax adjustment (e.g., EXEMPTION, REDUCTION). |
| `effectiveFrom` | `DateTime!` | When this adjustment becomes effective. |
| `effectiveTo` | `DateTime` | When this adjustment ends (null if open-ended). |

## Type `SwitchAccountToVariablePaymentScheduleInput`

**Kind:** `INPUT_OBJECT`

Input type for switching an account to a variable payment schedule. Requires an `account_number` and `ledger_number` to be provided.

| Input field | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `accountNumber` | `String!` | Number of the account for which to update the schedule. |
| `ledgerNumber` | `String!` | Number of the ledger associated with the current payment schedule. |
| `targetChangeDate` | `Date` | The date from which the variable payment schedule should start. Defaults to today. |
| `note` | `String` | A note to be added to the payment schedule to explain the change. |
| `cancelConflictingSchedules` | `Boolean` | If true, any conflicting future payment schedules on the ledger will be deleted before creating the new variable schedule. Default: `false`. |

| `validToDate` | `IndustryMidnightAlignedDateField` | The date until the contract remains valid. Must not be beyond the current contract end date. |

## Type `TimeSeriesSpecificationEligibilityScheduleInput`

**Kind:** `INPUT_OBJECT`

Input type for defining a time series specification eligibility schedule.

This input type is used to specify the details of a time series specification eligibility schedule,
including the associated product code, time series specification code, eligibility status, and effective period.

| Input field | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `productCode` | `String!` | The product code associated with the time series specification. |
| `timeSeriesSpecificationCode` | `String!` | The time series specification code. |
| `isEligible` | `Boolean!` | Indicates if the time series specification is eligible. |
| `effectivePeriod` | `RateGroupEligibilityPeriodInput!` | The period during which this eligibility is effective. |

## Type `TransferLedgerBalanceInputType`

**Kind:** `INPUT_OBJECT`

| Input field | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|

| `targetAccountLedger` | `AccountLedgerInput!` | Account's ledger to which the requested amount is credited. |

## Type `UpdateAPIExceptionInput`

**Kind:** `INPUT_OBJECT`

| Input field | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `id` | `Int!` | The ID of the API Exception that will be updated. |
| `resolutionStatus` | `APIExceptionResolutionStatus` | The new resolution status. If none is provided, the field won't be updated. Default: `null`. |
| `resolutionType` | `APIExceptionResolutionType` | The new resolution type. If none is provided, the field won't be updated. Default: `null`. |
| `priority` | `APIExceptionPriority` | The new priority. If none is provided, the field won't be updated. Default: `null`. |
| `context` | `JSONString` | The new context. If none is provided, the field won't be updated. This will completely replace the existing context by the new one. |
| `category` | `APIExceptionCategories` | The new category. If none is provided, the field won't be updated. Default: `null`. |
| `tags` | `[APIExceptionTags]` | The updated list of tags. If none is provided, the field won't be updated. |
| `keyDate` | `Date` | The new key date. If none is provided, the field won't be updated. |
| `assignedUserId` | `Int` | The ID of the user assigned to handle this exception.If no user is provided, no user will be assigned to the exception. |
| `operationsTeamId` | `Int` | The ID of an operations team to handle this exception. If no team is provided, no team will be assigned to the exception. |
| `accountNumber` | `String` | The account number associated with this exception. If none is provided, the field won't be updated. |

| Input field | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|

| `apiExceptionNoteId` | `ID!` | The ID of the API Exception note being updated. |

## Type `UpdateAccountUserInput`

**Kind:** `INPUT_OBJECT`

Input required to update an AccountUser and its AccountUserDetails.

| Input field | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `givenName` | `String` |  |
| `familyName` | `String` |  |
| `pronouns` | `String` | How the user would like us to address them (e.g. 'she/her', 'they/them'). Because this field is clearable, null and the empty string are treated differently; passing null or omitting the field leaves the value as-is, but explicitly passing an empty string clears this value. |
| `email` | `String` |  |
| `mobile` | `String` | Because this field is clearable, null and the empty string are treated differently; passing null or omitting the field leaves the value as-is, but explicitly passing an empty string clears this value. |
| `dateOfBirth` | `Date` |  |
| `landline` | `String` | Because this field is clearable, null and the empty string are treated differently; passing null or omitting the field leaves the value as-is, but explicitly passing an empty string clears this value. |
| `userId` | `String` | The user for whom to perform the update. This is only needed when using an Organisation role. |
| `title` | `String` | The user's title. |
| `label` | `String` | A free text field to help identifying the customer (e.g. for a job title). |
| `details` | `[DetailsInputType]` | User details. |
| `kanaFamilyName` | `String` |  |
| `kanaGivenName` | `String` |  |

## Type `UpdateAffiliateLinkInputType`

**Kind:** `INPUT_OBJECT`

| Input field | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `linkId` | `ID!` | The id of the affiliate link that is going to be edited. |
| `organisationId` | `ID` | The organisation for whom to update the affiliate link for. |
| `subdomain` | `String` | Will be validated as follows: - should be at least two characters - should only contain (letters, numbers, and Hyphen) - should not contain bad words - should not contain any of the reserved words including: affiliates, api, business, click, consul, developer, friends, kraken, mail, sendgrid, tech, webhooks, www, www2 |
| `contactName` | `String` | The contact name for the link. |
| `contactEmail` | `String` | The contact email for the link. |
| `isBusiness` | `Boolean` | Is this link for business customers. |
| `landingUrl` | `String` | The landing URL for the link. |
| `trainingStatus` | `String` | The training status for the link. |

## Type `UpdateAffiliateOrganisationInputType`

**Kind:** `INPUT_OBJECT`

| Input field | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `organisationId` | `ID!` | The organisation that is going to be edited. |
| `name` | `String` | The name of the organisation. |
| `contactEmail` | `String` | The primary contact email for the organisation, used to send notifications about API usage such as authentication and permissions. |
| `salesChannel` | `SalesChannelChoices` | Sales Channel. Default: `null`. Deprecated: The 'salesChannel' field is deprecated. Please use salesChannelCode instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2025-07-17. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-10-17. |
| `salesChannelCode` | `String` | Sales Channel Code. Default: `null`. |
| `defaultAccountType` | `AccountTypeChoices` | Default Account Type. Default: `null`. |
| `canRegisterBusinessMeterPoints` | `Boolean` | Are meter point registrations limited for profile classes 1 and 2 for registrations from csv or API. |
| `canRegisterPortfolioAccounts` | `Boolean` | Allow registration requests with exiting account user emails to add to the portfolio belonging to the account user. |
| `canRegisterCustomersWithoutEmailAddress` | `Boolean` | Allow registration requests with customers without an email address. |
| `skipMeterPointAddressValidation` | `Boolean` | Allow this partner to skip validation that ensures all meter points belong to the same address. |
| `allowAlternativePaymentMethods` | `Boolean` | Is this partner allowed to specify payment methods other than Direct Debit in the import csv or API. |
| `canRenewTariffs` | `Boolean` | Allow performing tariff renewals via API. |
| `canUseIvrSupportApi` | `Boolean` | Allow this partner access to the IVR support API (modify their own IVR handling through third party 'IVR Flow Editor'). |
| `isFieldSalesOnlyProduct` | `Boolean` | Restrict to field-sales-only products? This is only allowed for the 'field-sales' and 'events' sales channels. |

**Kind:** `INPUT_OBJECT`

|---|---:|---|
| `accountNumber` | `String!` | Account number to update the schedule auto top up amount for. |
| `ledgerId` | `Int` | Specifies the ledger ID associated with the current schedule for updates. Deprecated: The 'ledgerId' field is deprecated. Please use 'ledgerNumber' instead. This is in the form of 'L-123456789A' - Marked as deprecated on 2024-10-22. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-06-25. |
| `ledgerNumber` | `String` | Specifies the ledger number associated with the current schedule for updates. |
| `paymentAmount` | `Int!` | The new auto-top-up amount for the payment schedule. |

Lead-level assignment is being removed. Assignment is managed at Opportunity level. - Marked as deprecated on 2026-05-19. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2026-07-19. |
| `assignedToUsername` | `String` | The username of the user to assign the lead to. Deprecated: The 'assignedToUsername' field is deprecated. Please use 'assignedToUserIdentifier' instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2026-04-22. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2026-06-22. |

| `assignedToUserIdentifier` | `String` | The identifier of the user to assign the lead to. Deprecated: The 'assignedToUserIdentifier' field is deprecated. Lead-level assignment is being removed. Assignment is managed at Opportunity level. - Marked as deprecated on 2026-05-19. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2026-07-19. |
| `assignedToTeamIdentifier` | `String` | The identifier of the team to assign the lead to. Deprecated: The 'assignedToTeamIdentifier' field is deprecated. Lead-level assignment is being removed. Assignment is managed at Opportunity level. - Marked as deprecated on 2026-05-19. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2026-07-19. |

## Type `UpdateUserInput`

**Kind:** `INPUT_OBJECT`

| Input field | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `givenName` | `String` |  |
| `familyName` | `String` |  |
| `pronouns` | `String` | How the user would like us to address them (e.g. 'she/her', 'they/them'). Because this field is clearable, null and the empty string are treated differently; passing null or omitting the field leaves the value as-is, but explicitly passing an empty string clears this value. |
| `email` | `String` |  |
| `mobile` | `String` | Because this field is clearable, null and the empty string are treated differently; passing null or omitting the field leaves the value as-is, but explicitly passing an empty string clears this value. |
| `dateOfBirth` | `Date` |  |
| `landline` | `String` | Because this field is clearable, null and the empty string are treated differently; passing null or omitting the field leaves the value as-is, but explicitly passing an empty string clears this value. |
| `userId` | `String` | The user for whom to perform the update. This is only needed when using an Organisation role. |
| `title` | `String` | The user's title. |
| `label` | `String` | A free text field to help identifying the customer (e.g. for a job title). |
| `details` | `[DetailsInputType]` | User details. |

## Type `AbstractSupplyPointProcessInterface`

**Kind:** `INTERFACE`

Interface for all lifecycle journey processes that
inherit from AbstractSupplyPointProcess.

**Possible types:** `LeaveSupplierProcessType`, `JoinSupplierProcessType`, `OccupyPropertyProcessType`, `LeavePropertyProcessType`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `id` | `ID` | The ID or the primary key of the lifecycle process. |
| `status` | `LifecycleSupplyPointProcessStatus` | The status of the process. |
| `supplyPoints(before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `SupplyPointConnectionTypeConnection!` | The supply points associated with the process. |

### Field arguments

#### `supplyPoints`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `before` | `String` |  |
| `after` | `String` |  |
| `first` | `Int` |  |
| `last` | `Int` |  |

## Type `AccessibilityInterface`

**Kind:** `INTERFACE`

Properties relating to the accessibility of features.

**Possible types:** `ComponentListType`, `ImageType`, `AnimationType`, `CloseActionType`, `CardComponentType`, `FormScreenType`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `accessibilityHidden` | `Boolean` | Whether the element is hidden from view. |
| `accessibilityLabel` | `String` | Accessible description of the element. |

## Type `AccountInterface`

**Kind:** `INTERFACE`

**Possible types:** `Account`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `complaints(before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `ComplaintConnectionTypeConnection` | The complaints associated with an account. |
| `brand` | `String` | The brand of the account. |
| `status` | `AccountStatus` | The current status of the account. |
| `balance(includeAllLedgers: Boolean)` | `Int!` | The current account balance. |
| `overdueBalance` | `Int` | The current account overdue balance. |
| `urn` | `String` | Unique reference number from a 3rd party enrolment. |
| `billingName` | `String` | The billing name of the account. |
| `billingSubName` | `String` | The billing sub name of the account. |
| `billingEmail` | `String` | The billing email of the account. |
| `billingAddress` | `String` | The billing address of the account. |
| `billingAddressLine1` | `String` |  |
| `billingAddressLine2` | `String` |  |
| `billingAddressLine3` | `String` |  |
| `billingAddressLine4` | `String` |  |
| `billingAddressLine5` | `String` |  |
| `billingAddressPostcode` | `String` |  |
| `billingCountryCode` | `String` |  |
| `billingDeliveryPointIdentifier` | `String` |  |
| `splitBillingAddress` | `[String]` | List of billing address lines. |
| `address` | `RichAddressType` | The billing address of this account, stored in the new libaddressinput-based format. Note that `name` and `organization` are very unlikely to be supplied here; the `billing_name` field on the account itself is generally used for that purpose instead. |
| `number` | `String` | A code that uniquely identifies the account. |
| `portfolio` | `PortfolioType` | The portfolio this account is linked to. |
| `ledgers(ledgerId: ID, ledgerNumber: String, includeDebtLedgers: Boolean)` | `[LedgerType]` | Ledgers provide the foundation of bookkeeping functionality. Similar to a bank account, they allow us to keep track of financial activity on a particular customer account. |
| `metadata` | `[Metadata]` | Metadata associated with the account. |
| `canRequestRefund` | `Boolean` | Whether the account can request a credit refund. |
| `requestRefundEligibility(ledgerNumber: String)` | `RequestRefundEligibilityType` | Details about the eligibility status for requesting a refund. |
| `payments(ledgerId: String, ledgerNumber: String, status: AccountPaymentStatusOptions, reason: PaymentReasonOptions, includePromises: Boolean, before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `AccountPaymentConnectionTypeConnection` | The payments made into an account from a payment instruction. |
| `repayments(statuses: [AccountRepaymentStatusOptions], before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `AccountRepaymentConnectionTypeConnection` | The repayments that have been requested for this account. |
| `paymentPlans(before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `PaymentPlanConnectionTypeConnection` | The payment plans that have been created for this account. |
| `paymentSchedules(activeOnDate: Date, active: Boolean, canCreatePayment: Boolean, includeDormant: Boolean, ledgerType: Int, ledgerId: ID, ledgerNumber: String, reason: PaymentScheduleReasonOptions, before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `PaymentScheduleConnectionTypeConnection` | The schedules that describe how we would expect to take payments for an account on a given month. |
| `paymentForecast(dateTo: Date!, ledgerId: Int, ledgerNumber: String)` | `[PaymentForecastType]` | A list displaying the payment forecast for an account. The list starts from today's date (inclusive). Deprecated: The 'paymentForecast' field is deprecated. Please use 'paginatedPaymentForecast' instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2024-01-03. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-01-01. |
| `paginatedPaymentForecast(dateTo: Date, ledgerId: Int, ledgerNumber: String, before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `PaymentForecastConnectionTypeConnection` | Paginated payment forecasts for an account. Starts from today's date (inclusive). The interface supports `last` but does not guarantee 'lastness'. |
| `referrals(status: ReferralStatus, before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `ReferralConnectionTypeConnection` | The referrals created by this account. |
| `referralsCreated` | `Int` | Number of referrals created by this account. |
| `rewards` | `[RewardType]` | The rewards applied to this account. |
| `activeReferralSchemes` | `ReferralSchemeTypes` | The referral schemes currently active for this account. |
| `transactions(transactionTypes: [TransactionTypeFilter], transactionTypesExcluded: [TransactionTypeFilter], ledgerId: Int, ledgerNumber: String, includeAllLedgers: Boolean, fromDate: Date, toDate: Date, orderBy: TransactionsOrderBy, offset: Int, before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `TransactionConnectionTypeConnection` | Fetch transactions that have taken place on the account. |
| `provisionalTransactions(before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `ProvisionalTransactionConnectionTypeConnection` |  |
| `annualStatements(before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `AnnualStatementConnectionTypeConnection` | Fetch annual statements for the account. |
| `bills(includeBillsWithoutPDF: Boolean, includeOpenStatements: Boolean, includeHeldStatements: Boolean, includeHistoricStatements: Boolean, onlyCurrentEmail: Boolean, ledgerNumber: String, fromDate: Date, toDate: Date, issuedFromDate: Date, issuedToDate: Date, orderBy: BillsOrderBy, offset: Int, before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `BillConnectionTypeConnection` | Fetch issued bills (invoices/statements) for the account. |
| `billingOptions` | `BillingOptionsType` | Information about the account's billing cycle. |
| `billingTriggerConfiguration` | `BillingTriggerConfiguration` | The active billing trigger configuration for the account. |
| `bill(id: ID, identifier: String, billType: BillTypeEnum, ledgerNumber: String)` | `BillInterface` | Fetch a specific issued bill (invoice/statement) for the account. |
| `directDebitInstructions(statuses: [DirectDebitInstructionStatus], before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `DirectDebitInstructionConnectionTypeConnection` | The direct debit instructions of the account |
| `paymentMethods(statuses: [PaymentInstructionStatus], before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `PaymentInstructionConnectionTypeConnection` | The payment instructions of the account. |
| `events(eventTypes: [AccountEventType], before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `AccountEventConnectionTypeConnection` | The account events that were recorded for the account. |
| `applications(status: AccountApplicationStatus, before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `AccountApplicationConnectionTypeConnection` | Applications by this account to become our customer. More recent applications will be listed first. |
| `accountType` | `AccountTypeChoices` | The type of account. |
| `businessType` | `BusinessTypeOptions` | The company type of a business account. Deprecated: The 'businessType' field is deprecated. Use `business.businessType` instead - Marked as deprecated on 2022-03-09. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2024-01-01. |
| `business` | `BusinessType` | Business info related to a business account. |
| `commsDeliveryPreference` | `CommsDeliveryPreference` | The method the account has specified they prefer we contact them. |
| `communicationDeliveryPreference` | `String` |  Deprecated: The 'communicationDeliveryPreference' field is deprecated. Use `commsDeliveryPreference` instead - Marked as deprecated on 2022-05-27. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2024-01-01. |
| `documentAccessibility` | `DocumentAccessibilityChoices` | The document accessibility preference of the account. |
| `references` | `[AccountReferenceType]` | Account references linked to this account. |
| `fileAttachments` | `[AccountFileAttachment]` | Files attached to this account. |
| `paginatedFileAttachments(id: Int, category: String, before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `AccountFileAttachmentConnectionTypeConnection` | Files attached to this account. |
| `maximumRefund(ledgerNumber: String)` | `MaximumRefundType` | The maximum amount a customer is allowed to request as a refund and the reason why that's the maximum amount. |
| `campaigns` | `[AccountCampaignType]` | The campaigns associated with an account. |
| `isInHardship` | `Boolean` | True if there is an active Hardship Agreement for this account. False otherwise. |
| `activeHardshipAgreements` | `[HardshipAgreementType]` | List of active hardship agreements for the user when is_in_hardship is True. |
| `notes` | `[AccountNoteType]` | Notes for the account. |
| `contributionAgreements` | `[ContributionAgreementType]` | Contribution agreements for account. |
| `assistanceAgreements` | `[AssistanceAgreementType]` | Assistance agreements for account. |
| `debtCollectionProceedings` | `[DebtCollectionProceedingType]` | Debt collection proceedings for account. |
| `createdAt` | `DateTime` | The datetime that the account was originally created. |
| `preferredLanguageForComms` | `String` | The language that the account preferred for communications. |
| `consents` | `[ConsentType!]!` | Consents linked to this account. |
| `reminders(before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `AccountReminderConnectionTypeConnection` | The reminders associated with an account. |
| `customerAssets` | `[CustomerAssetType]` | Get customer assets for an account. |

#### `balance`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `includeAllLedgers` | `Boolean` | If this variable is set to true, the balance will be calculated based on the sum of balances on all ledgers configured to contribute to this account's balance. Otherwise, only the main ledger's balance will be fetched (legacy behaviour). If you are unsure, set this value to true. Default: `false`. |

#### `ledgers`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `ledgerId` | `ID` | The ledger to return. Deprecated: The 'ledgerId' field is deprecated. Please use 'ledgerNumber' instead. This is in the form of 'L-123456789A' - Marked as deprecated on 2024-10-22. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-06-25. |
| `ledgerNumber` | `String` | The ledger to return by its number. |
| `includeDebtLedgers` | `Boolean` | If this variable is set to false, debt ledgerswill be filtered out of the ledgers list. Default: `true`. |

| `ledgerNumber` | `String` | **WARNING: Will be mandatory in future versions** The number of the ledger to return payments from. |
| `status` | `AccountPaymentStatusOptions` |  |
| `reason` | `PaymentReasonOptions` | Filter for payments that were taken for a particular reason. |
| `includePromises` | `Boolean` | Whether to include payment promises (of any kind: made, broken or fulfilled) or not. The default is to include them. Default: `true`. |

| `after` | `String` |  |
| `first` | `Int` |  |

| `includeDormant` | `Boolean` | If false, we remove the currently valid schedule if it has already fulfilled its purpose and will have no further impact on customer payments, along with any schedules which are not valid from today. Default: `true`. |

| `ledgerId` | `Int` | The ledger to return transactions from. Deprecated: The 'ledgerId' field is deprecated. Please use 'ledgerNumber' instead. This is in the form of 'L-123456789A' - Marked as deprecated on 2024-10-22. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-06-25. |
| `ledgerNumber` | `String` | The number of the ledger to return transactions from. |
| `includeAllLedgers` | `Boolean` | In a multi-ledger scenario, include all ledgers' transactions if `true`. Analogously, if `false` and no `ledgerId` or `ledger_number` argument is present, the list of transactions defaults to the main ledger (legacy behaviour). |
| `fromDate` | `Date` | Optional date representing the beginning of the postedDate range filter. This date value is inclusive. |
| `toDate` | `Date` | Optional date representing the end of the postedDate range filter. This date value is exclusive. |
| `orderBy` | `TransactionsOrderBy` | The order in which to return the transactions. Default: `POSTED_DATE_DESC`. |

#### `bills`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `includeBillsWithoutPDF` | `Boolean` | Include bills without PDFs. Default: `false`. |
| `includeOpenStatements` | `Boolean` | Include open statements. This flag needs to be used along with includeBillsWithoutPDF=false otherwise results will prove unexpected. Default: `false`. |
| `includeHeldStatements` | `Boolean` | Include held statements within the results. Default: `false`. |
| `includeHistoricStatements` | `Boolean` | Include pre-Kraken / historical statements within the results. Default: `true`. |
| `onlyCurrentEmail` | `Boolean` | Only include bills emailed to the current user's email. Default: `false`. |
| `ledgerNumber` | `String` | The number of a ledger for the bill. When provided, only period- or item-based documents for this account that are linked to that ledger are returned; collective bills and legacy bills are excluded. Historic/pre-Kraken bills are unaffected by this filter and are included or excluded solely by includeHistoricStatements. |
| `fromDate` | `Date` | Optional date representing the beginning of the search results. This date value is inclusive. |
| `toDate` | `Date` | Optional date representing the end of the search results. This date value is exclusive. |
| `issuedFromDate` | `Date` | Optional date representing the beginning of the search results based on issued date. This date value is inclusive. |
| `issuedToDate` | `Date` | Optional date representing the end of the search results based on issued date. This date value is exclusive. |
| `orderBy` | `BillsOrderBy` | The order in which to return the bills. Default: `FROM_DATE_DESC`. |
| `offset` | `Int` |  |
| `before` | `String` |  |
| `after` | `String` |  |
| `first` | `Int` |  |
| `last` | `Int` |  |

#### `bill`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `id` | `ID` | The unique identifier of the bill. |
| `identifier` | `String` | The unique identifier of the bill. A pending billing document will not have an identifier yet. And not all finalized billing documents will have an identifier. Prefer using the id field unless advised by Kraken. |
| `billType` | `BillTypeEnum` |  |
| `ledgerNumber` | `String` | The number of the ledger for the bill. When provided, only the period- or item-based documentfor this account that is linked to that ledger is returned; pre-kraken, collective bills, and legacy bills are excluded. |

## Type `ActionInterface`

**Kind:** `INTERFACE`

Actions are events created by buttons and other interaction.

**Possible types:** `DeeplinkActionType`, `LinkActionType`, `BackendScreenEventActionType`, `CloseActionType`, `ScreenActionType`, `ShowInputFieldErrorsActionType`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `typeName` | `String` | The name of the action object's type. |

## Type `AgreementInterface`

**Kind:** `INTERFACE`

**Possible types:** `Agreement`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `id` | `Int` | The ID of the agreement. |
| `validFrom` | `DateTime` | The start datetime of the agreement. |
| `validTo` | `DateTime` | The end datetime of the agreement. |
| `agreedFrom` | `DateTime` | The datetime the agreement was entered. |
| `agreedTo` | `DateTime` | The datetime the agreement was terminated. |
| `isRevoked` | `Boolean` | Whether the agreement is revoked. |
| `rescissionDeadlineAt` | `DateTime` | The deadline datetime for rescinding the agreement. |
| `ratesAgreedAt` | `DateTime` | The datetime the rates were agreed. |

## Type `BackendScreenInterface`

**Kind:** `INTERFACE`

A backend screen is the top-level container for mobile UI.

**Possible types:** `ComponentListType`, `GenericBackendScreen`, `FormScreenType`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `name` | `String!` | The name of the screen. |
| `refreshFrequency` | `Int` | The refresh / polling frequency in milliseconds. |
| `screenData` | `String` | Serialized JSON representation of the screen. |

## Type `BillInterface`

**Kind:** `INTERFACE`

**Possible types:** `StatementType`, `PreKrakenBillType`, `PeriodBasedDocumentType`, `CollectiveBillType`, `InvoiceType`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `id` | `ID` | The ID of the bill. |
| `billType` | `BillTypeEnum` | The type of the bill. |
| `fromDate` | `Date` | The date of the bill is covered from. |
| `toDate` | `Date` | The date of the bill is covered to. |
| `temporaryUrl` | `String` | Requesting this field generates a temporary URL at which bill is available. This URL will expire after approximately an hour. It is intended for redirection purposes, NOT persistence in any form (e.g. inclusion in emails or the body of a web page). This field can raise an error with errorClass NOT_FOUND if the bill document has not been created/issued yet. This field is deprecated use 'attachments' field instead. Deprecated: The 'temporaryUrl' field is deprecated. This field is deprecated. Use the 'attachments' field instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2024-09-16. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-09-01. |
| `issuedDate` | `Date` | The date the bill was sent to the customer. |
| `attachments(before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `BillingAttachmentConnectionTypeConnection` |  |
| `reversalsAfterClose` | `StatementReversalsAfterClose!` | How many charges have been reversed after the close date. |

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `before` | `String` |  |
| `after` | `String` |  |
| `first` | `Int` |  |
| `last` | `Int` |  |

## Type `BillTransactionType`

**Kind:** `INTERFACE`

Transactions are a record of money being added or subtracted from a ledger

**Possible types:** `BillCharge`, `BillCredit`, `BillPayment`, `BillRefund`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `id` | `ID` | The unique identifier for the transaction. |
| `postedDate` | `Date` | The date the transaction was posted. |
| `createdAt` | `DateTime` | The date time when the transaction is created. |
| `amounts` | `TransactionAmountType` | The net, tax and gross amounts for the transaction. Note: for payments and repayments, only the net amount is returned. |
| `title` | `String` | A user readable string that indicates what this transaction relates to. |
| `note` | `String` | Returns the note field value for the transaction, which contains additional info. |
| `reasonCode` | `String` | Returns the reason. |

## Type `ButtonInterface`

**Kind:** `INTERFACE`

The button interface.

**Possible types:** `RectangularButtonType`, `PillButtonType`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `buttonStyle` | `ButtonStyle` | The button style. |
| `title` | `String!` | Title text of the button. |
| `buttonAction` | `ActionType!` | The action to perform when the button is pressed. |

## Type `CallInterface`

**Kind:** `INTERFACE`

**Possible types:** `InboundCallType`, `OutboundCallType`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `id` | `ID!` | The ID of the call. |
| `account` | `Account` | If known, this is the account that a call is about. For inbound calls, we attempt to identify the account based on the phone number of the incoming call. For outbound calls, the account will be automatically set if the call was initiated from an account page. For all call types, the account can be updated, for example to correct a misidentification of an incoming call. |
| `metadata` | `[CallMetadataItemType]!` | Metadata related to the call, for example metrics or data passed via an interactive voice response (IVR). |

**Possible types:** `StringCharacteristicValueType`, `IntegerCharacteristicValueType`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `value` | `String` | A string representation of a characteristic value, for convenience. |
| `characteristic` | `CharacteristicType` | The product characteristic. |

| `status` | `ContractJourneyStatus` | The status of the contract journey. |
| `contractDetails` | `ContractDetails` | The details of the associated contract. |
| `journeyType` | `ContractJourneyType` | The type of the contract journey. |
| `requestedAt` | `DateTime` | The date and time when the contract journey was requested. |

## Type `DeviceChargingSession`

**Kind:** `INTERFACE`

**Possible types:** `PublicChargingSession`, `SmartFlexChargingSession`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `start` | `DateTime!` | The start time of a charging session. |
| `end` | `DateTime!` | The end time of a charging session. |
| `stateOfChargeChange` | `Decimal` | The change in state of charge during a charging session. The value will be between 0 and 100, if not null. |
| `stateOfChargeFinal` | `Decimal` | The final state of charge after a charging session. The value will be between 0 and 100, if not null. |
| `energyAdded` | `Energy` | The energy added during a charging session. |
| `cost` | `Money` | The cost for the charge added during a charging session. |

## Type `DeviceReAuthenticationInterface`

**Kind:** `INTERFACE`

**Possible types:** `DeviceReAuthentication`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `isEligible` | `Boolean` | Whether the device is eligible for re-authentication. If it returns False, then re-authentication is not supported for this device. Please remove and re-add the device to restore connectivity. |

## Type `ElectricDevice`

**Kind:** `INTERFACE`

**Possible types:** `SmartFlexVehicle`, `SmartFlexChargePoint`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `chargingSessions(before: DateTime, after: DateTime, sessionTypes: [ChargingSessionType], first: Int, last: Int)` | `DeviceChargingSessionConnection` | History of charging sessions for a SmartFlex device. |

### Field arguments

#### `chargingSessions`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `before` | `DateTime` | Latest time of the charging sessions i.e. end of the time window. Only sessions that start before this datetime are returned. Must be later than `after`. |
| `after` | `DateTime` | Earliest time of the charging sessions i.e. the start of the time window. Only sessions that start at or after this datetime are returned. Must be earlier than `before`. |
| `sessionTypes` | `[ChargingSessionType]` | The types of charging sessions to be returned. |
| `first` | `Int` |  |
| `last` | `Int` |  |

| `sizeInBytes` | `Int` |  |

| Field | Returns | Description |

| `timeFrom` | `Time` | The minimum time a preference can be set to (inclusive). |
| `timeTo` | `Time` | The maximum time a preference can be set to (inclusive). |
| `timeStep` | `Int!` | The step amount (in minutes) a preference schedule time can be set. |
| `min` | `Decimal` | The minimum value a preference can be set to (inclusive). |
| `max` | `Decimal` | The maximum value a preference can be set to (inclusive). |
| `step` | `Decimal!` | The step size preference can be set to. |
| `minConstraint` | `PreferenceConstraint` | The constraint applied to the min value. |
| `maxConstraint` | `PreferenceConstraint` | The constraint applied to the max value. |
| `targetConstraint` | `PreferenceConstraint` | The constraint applied to the target value. |

## Type `GasProductInterface`

**Kind:** `INTERFACE`

**Possible types:** `GasTieredProduct`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `code` | `String!` | Product code. |
| `displayName` | `String!` | Human friendly name to be displayed in interfaces. |
| `params` | `GenericScalar` | A JSON object containing extra information. |
| `standingChargeUnitType` | `String` | Unit type for standing charge. |
| `standingCharges` | `[TieredStandingCharge]!` | List of standing charge product rates. |
| `consumptionCharges` | `[TieredConsumptionRate]!` | List of consumption product rates. |

## Type `HasReadings`

**Kind:** `INTERFACE`

**Possible types:** `SupplyPointType`, `Device`, `DeviceRegister`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `readings(startAt: DateTime!, endAt: DateTime!, readingType: ReadingTypes!, timeGranularity: TimeGranularities, timezone: String, units: [Units])` | `Readings` | Get readings from a readable device e.g., a supply point, device, or register. |

### Field arguments

#### `readings`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `startAt` | `DateTime!` | The inclusive start of the time period as an isoformatted string. |
| `endAt` | `DateTime!` | The exclusive end of the time period as an isoformatted string. |
| `readingType` | `ReadingTypes!` | Get readings of only this type. |
| `timeGranularity` | `TimeGranularities` | Time buckets to group readings into. |
| `timezone` | `String` | The timezone in which to return readings. Default: `"Asia/Tokyo"`. |
| `units` | `[Units]` | Optional filter to return readings only for specific list of units or unit (e.g., KILOWATT_HOURS, METERS_CUBED, LITER, etc.). |

| `typename` | `String` | The name of the object's type. |

## Type `LeaveSupplierProcessDataInterface`

**Kind:** `INTERFACE`

Represents data associated with a LeaveSupplier journey.

i.e. concrete implementation of AbstractLeaveSupplierProcessData.

**Possible types:** `LeaveSupplierProcessData`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `requestedAt` | `DateTime` | The time at which the process was initiated. |
| `requestedSupplyEndDate` | `Date` | The requested supply end date. |
| `marketData` | `LeaveSupplierMarketOutputType` | The market data associated with the process. |
| `waiveExitFee` | `Boolean` | Whether the exit fee is to be waived. |
| `futureBillingAddress` | `RichAddressType` | The future billing address for the customers account. |

## Type `LedgerInterface`

**Kind:** `INTERFACE`

**Possible types:** `LedgerType`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `id` | `ID` |  Deprecated: The 'ledgerId' field is deprecated. Please use 'ledgerNumber' instead. This is in the form of 'L-123456789A' - Marked as deprecated on 2024-10-22. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-06-25. |
| `name` | `String` | The display name of the ledger. |
| `number` | `String` | The canonical name of the ledger. |
| `ledgerType` | `String` |  |
| `balance` | `Int` | The current balance on the ledger in minor units of currency. |
| `amountOwedByCustomer` | `Int` | The amount owed from the customer perspective. A positive value implies the customer owes the business, while a negative amount implies the customer is in credit. |
| `affectsAccountBalance` | `Boolean` | Whether this ledger's balance contributes to the account's balance. |
| `statements(before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `StatementBillingDocumentConnectionTypeConnection` | A statement is a billing document that contains all entries on a ledger during a period of time. A customer can understand how their ledger's balance has changed by looking at each statement in series. |
| `invoices(before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `InvoiceBillingDocumentConnectionTypeConnection` | An invoice is a bill that contains individual transactions (i.e. charges, credits, payments, and repayments). These may come from any period of time. |
| `transactions(transactionTypes: [TransactionTypeFilter], fromDate: Date, toDate: Date, orderBy: TransactionsOrderBy, before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `TransactionConnectionTypeConnection` | Transactions on the given ledger. |
| `repaymentRequests(before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `RepaymentRequestConnectionTypeConnection` | Repayment requests for a given ledger. |
| `refundRequests(before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `RefundRequestConnectionTypeConnection` | Refund requests for a given ledger. |
| `acceptsPayments` | `Boolean` | Whether payments can be posted onto this ledger. |
| `paymentAdequacy` | `PaymentAdequacyDetailsType` |  |
| `creditTransferPermissionsData` | `CreditTransferPermissionsDataType` | Permissions data for credit transfers involving the given ledger. |
| `paymentPreferences(before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `PaymentPreferenceConnectionTypeConnection` | The customer's preferred payment methods. |
| `paymentPreferenceAtTime(atTime: DateTime!)` | `PaymentPreferenceUnion` | The customer's preferred payment method at a point in time. The possible errors that can be raised are: - KT-CT-3976: The ledger has no configured payment preference. - KT-CT-3977: Ledger was not accepting payments at this time. - KT-CT-1113: Disabled GraphQL field requested. |
| `debtLedger` | `LedgerInterface` | The debt ledger assigned to this ledger. |
| `agreements(before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `AgreementConnection` | The charged supply agreements of the ledger. |
| `usablePaymentInstructions(usableAt: DateTime, before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `PaymentInstructionConnectionTypeConnection` | The usable payment instructions for this ledger. |
| `billingTriggerConfiguration` | `BillingTriggerConfiguration` | The active billing trigger configuration for the ledger. The possible errors that can be raised are: - KT-CT-9709: Billing trigger configuration only supports SupplementaryLedger type. - KT-CT-1113: Disabled GraphQL field requested. |

## Type `PropertyInterface`

**Kind:** `INTERFACE`

**Possible types:** `PropertyType`, `Property`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `id` | `String` |  |
| `address` | `String` | The address of the property, formatted into a single string. |
| `richAddress` | `PropertyRichAddressType` | Property rich address. |
| `splitAddress` | `[String]` | List of address lines. |
| `label` | `String` | An optional label for the property. |
| `occupancyPeriods` | `[OccupancyPeriodType]` | Time periods during which the property is associated with an account. Useful to display information about house-moves, as performing a move out of a property will set the end date for the occupancy period. |
| `coordinates` | `CoordinatesType` | Coordinates for the property, useful for displaying the property on a map. |
| `embeddedNetwork` | `EmbeddedNetworkType` | The embedded network this property belongs to, if any. |
| `parent(hierarchyName: String)` | `PropertyInterface` | The parent property in the specified hierarchy. Returns null if the property has no parent or is not in the hierarchy. |
| `descendants(hierarchyName: String, depth: Int, before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `PropertyConnection` | Descendant properties in the specified hierarchy. Returns empty list if the property is not in the hierarchy. |
| `ancestors(hierarchyName: String, before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `PropertyConnection` | Ancestor properties in the specified hierarchy, ordered from root to immediate parent. Returns empty list if the property is not in the hierarchy. |
| `measurements(startAt: DateTime, endAt: DateTime, startOn: Date, endOn: Date, timezone: String, utilityFilters: [UtilityFiltersInput], before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `MeasurementConnection` | Measurements at a property |

### Field arguments

#### `parent`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `hierarchyName` | `String` | The name of the hierarchy to query within. Default: `"default"`. |

#### `descendants`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `hierarchyName` | `String` | The name of the hierarchy to query within. Default: `"default"`. |
| `depth` | `Int` | Maximum depth of descendants to return. Defaults to 1 (immediate children). Set to null for all descendants. Default: `1`. |
| `before` | `String` |  |
| `after` | `String` |  |
| `first` | `Int` |  |
| `last` | `Int` |  |

#### `ancestors`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `hierarchyName` | `String` | The name of the hierarchy to query within. Default: `"default"`. |
| `before` | `String` |  |
| `after` | `String` |  |
| `first` | `Int` |  |
| `last` | `Int` |  |

#### `measurements`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `startAt` | `DateTime` | Defaults to the far past which will return the oldest readings. Default: `"0001-01-03T00:00:00+09:18:59"`. |
| `endAt` | `DateTime` | Defaults to the far future which will return the most recent readings. Default: `"9999-12-29T23:59:59.999999+09:00"`. |
| `startOn` | `Date` | Earliest date to return measurements from. |
| `endOn` | `Date` | Latest date to return measurements for (inclusive). |
| `timezone` | `String` | Timezone to use for grouping. Defaults to Kraken localtime. Default: `"Asia/Tokyo"`. |
| `utilityFilters` | `[UtilityFiltersInput]` | Filters for each utility being measured. Default: `[]`. |
| `before` | `String` |  |
| `after` | `String` |  |
| `first` | `Int` |  |
| `last` | `Int` |  |

## Type `SmartFlexDeviceInterface`

**Kind:** `INTERFACE`

Some general information about a device.

**Possible types:** `SmartFlexHeatPump`, `SmartFlexVehicle`, `SmartFlexChargePoint`, `SmartFlexDevice`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `id` | `ID!` | A UUID that identifies this device registration. Re-registering this device will result in a different ID. |
| `name` | `String` | The user-friendly name for the device. |
| `deviceType` | `KrakenFlexDeviceTypes!` | The type of device. |
| `provider` | `ProviderChoices!` | The third-party that enables control of this device. |
| `integrationDeviceId` | `String` | The third-party integration device ID. |
| `status` | `SmartFlexDeviceStatusInterface!` | Information about the current status of this device. |
| `propertyId` | `String` | The id of the property linked to the device. |
| `alerts` | `[SmartFlexDeviceAlertInterface]` | Active alert message(s) for a device, showing the latest first. |
| `onboardingWizard` | `SmartFlexOnboardingWizard` | The current onboarding wizard for a device. |
| `preferences` | `SmartFlexDevicePreferencesInterface` | The device's preference details. |
| `preferenceSetting` | `FlexDevicePreferenceSettingInterface` | The preference setting for this device. |
| `reAuthenticationState` | `DeviceReAuthenticationInterface` | The re-authentication state of this device, if applicable. |

## Type `TransactionType`

**Kind:** `INTERFACE`

Transactions are a record of money being added or subtracted from the overall account balance

**Possible types:** `Charge`, `Payment`, `Refund`, `Credit`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `id` | `ID` | Unique identifier for the transaction. |
| `postedDate` | `Date` | Date when the transaction was posted to the account. |
| `createdAt` | `DateTime` | The date time when the transaction is created. |
| `accountNumber` | `String` | Unique identifier of the account the transaction belongs to. |
| `amount` | `Int` | Gross amount including tax (when payable). Refer to the `amounts` field for a breakdown of this information. |
| `amounts` | `TransactionAmountType` | The net, tax and gross amounts for the transaction. Note: for payments and repayments, only the net amount is returned. |
| `balanceCarriedForward` | `Int` | The customer's resulting balance after this transaction has been applied, in the smallest unit of currency. |
| `isCredit` | `Boolean` | Deprecated. Deprecated: The 'isCredit' field is deprecated. This information is provided by the __typename introspection query. - Marked as deprecated on 2020-06-19. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2022-11-15. |
| `isAccountCharge` | `Boolean` | Deprecated. Deprecated: The 'isAccountCharge' field is deprecated. This information is provided by the __typename introspection query. - Marked as deprecated on 2020-06-19. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2022-11-15. |
| `isAccountPayment` | `Boolean` | Deprecated. Deprecated: The 'isAccountPayment' field is deprecated. This information is provided by the __typename introspection query. - Marked as deprecated on 2020-06-19. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2022-11-15. |
| `isHeld` | `Boolean` | Whether the statement this transaction is on has been held. A held statement is not sent to a customer automatically, but is instead marked for manual attention by operations staff. Returns False if a statement is not linked with the transaction. |
| `isIssued` | `Boolean` | Whether this transaction has been issued on any billing document.Note: Look for the most recently issued transaction instead of looking through all transactions as some accounts may have initial transactions that were not issued.This will return False if the transaction is not associated with any billing documents. |
| `title` | `String` | Human-readable title describing the transaction. |
| `billingDocumentIdentifier` | `ID` | The unique identifier for the most recent billing document linked with the transaction.Note: a transaction may be linked with multiple documents, but this field will only return the identifier for the most recent billing document. |
| `statementId` | `ID` | Returns None if a statement is not linked with the transaction. Deprecated: The 'statementId' field is deprecated. Use `billingDocumentIdentifier` instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2023-11-30. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2024-06-01. |
| `isReversed` | `Boolean!` |  |
| `hasStatement` | `Boolean` | Returns True if the transaction is linked with a statement. |
| `note` | `String` | Returns the note field value for the transaction, which contains additional info. |
| `reasonCode` | `String` | Returns the reason. |

## Type `APIBrownout`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `disablesRequestsTo` | `NonEmptyString` | For GraphQL APIs this will be a field identifier in the format <ParentType>.≤fieldName>, for REST APIs this will be an endpoint. |
| `status` | `APIBrownoutStatus` | The current status of this brownout. |
| `apiType` | `APIType` | The API type effected by this brownout. |
| `startsAt` | `NonEmptyString` | The iso formatted datetime at which this brownout will take effect. |
| `endsAt` | `NonEmptyString` | The iso formatted datetime at which this brownout will end. |

## Type `APIBrownoutConnection`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Paginator of API brownouts.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `pageInfo` | `PageInfo!` | Pagination data for this connection. |
| `edges` | `[APIBrownoutEdge]!` | Contains the nodes in this connection. |
| `totalCount` | `Int!` | Total number of nodes. |
| `edgeCount` | `Int!` | Number of nodes in the edge. |

## Type `APIBrownoutEdge`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

A Relay edge containing a `APIBrownout` and its cursor.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `node` | `APIBrownout` | The item at the end of the edge |
| `cursor` | `String!` | A cursor for use in pagination |

## Type `APICallType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `id` | `ID!` |  |
| `correlationId` | `String!` | The request's correlation id. |
| `operationName` | `String!` | Free field for the API caller to categorise their own operation name. This field can be used to filter entries on the UI. |
| `inputData` | `JSONString` | Input data for the API call if any. |
| `response` | `JSONString` | The response from the API call if any. |
| `context` | `JSONString` | Storage for the API client to submit any contextual information. |
| `createdAt` | `DateTime!` |  |

## Type `APIExceptionType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `id` | `ID!` |  |
| `externalIdentifier` | `String!` | External identifier submitted by the API client to track this exception on their end. |
| `createdAt` | `DateTime!` |  |
| `channel` | `String!` | Free field for the API caller to categorise a channel. This could be (but not limited to) the client's team that calleded the API, the name of the 'flow' the call belongs to, etc. |
| `category` | `APIExceptionCategories` | Category associated with this exception. |
| `accountNumber` | `String` | The account number provided to the exception. |
| `userId` | `BigInt` | The user id provided to the exception. |
| `customerContact` | `String` | The customer contact provided to the exception. |
| `supplyPointIdentifier` | `String` | The supply point identifier provided to the exception. |
| `resolutionStatus` | `APIExceptionResolutionStatus!` | The current resolution status for the API exception. |
| `resolutionType` | `APIExceptionResolutionType!` | The current resolution type for the API exception. |
| `priority` | `APIExceptionPriority!` | The current priority for the API exception. |
| `apiCalls` | `[APICallType]` | The API calls associated with this exception if any. |
| `events` | `[APIExceptionEventType]` | The events associated with this exception if any. |
| `tags` | `[APIExceptionTags]` | Tags associated with this exception if any. |
| `notes` | `[APIExceptionNoteType]` | Notes associated with this exception if any. |
| `operationsTeam` | `OperationsTeamType` | The operations team assigned to this exception if any. |
| `context` | `JSONString` | Storage for the API client to submit any contextual information. |
| `keyDate` | `Date` | The key date associated with the exception, if available. |
| `assignedUser` | `AssignedUserType` | The user assigned to handle this exception if any. |

## Type `AcceptGoodsQuote`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

The possible errors that can be raised are:

- KT-CT-8223: Unauthorized.
- KT-CT-8201: Received an invalid quoteId.
- KT-CT-8224: Invalid data.
- KT-CT-1113: Disabled GraphQL field requested.
- KT-CT-1111: Unauthorized.
- KT-CT-1112: 'Authorization' header not provided.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `possibleErrors` | `[PossibleErrorType]` | Field with the possible errors of the query/mutation. Deprecated: The 'possibleErrors' field is deprecated. Please use the 'possibleErrors' query or the 'X-Kraken-Possible-Errors' header instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2025-01-31. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-03-01. |
| `goodsPurchase` | `GoodsPurchase` | Goods purchase created. |

## Type `AcceptOfferForQuoting`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Accept a quoting offer in an offer group.

The possible errors that can be raised are:

- KT-CT-12402: Unable to accept offer.
- KT-CT-1113: Disabled GraphQL field requested.
- KT-CT-1111: Unauthorized.
- KT-CT-1112: 'Authorization' header not provided.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `possibleErrors` | `[PossibleErrorType]` | Field with the possible errors of the query/mutation. Deprecated: The 'possibleErrors' field is deprecated. Please use the 'possibleErrors' query or the 'X-Kraken-Possible-Errors' header instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2025-01-31. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-03-01. |
| `offer` | `OfferType` | Accepted quoting offer. |

## Type `Account`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

The account object can be one of several attached to a `Portfolio` (which usually has an `AccountUser` which is used to authenticate access to the `Portfolio`'s accounts). Typically a person has a single account attached to a portfolio and properties on the same account will appear on the same bill. Where separate bills are desired, multiple accounts  are created and added to the same portfolio of accounts.

**Implements:** `AccountInterface`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `id` | `ID!` |  |
| `number` | `String` | A code that uniquely identifies the account. |
| `status` | `AccountStatus` | The current status of the account. |
| `users` | `[AccountUser!]!` |  |
| `complaints(before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `ComplaintConnectionTypeConnection` | The complaints associated with an account. |
| `brand` | `String` | The brand of the account. |
| `balance(includeAllLedgers: Boolean)` | `Int!` | The current account balance. |
| `overdueBalance` | `Int` | The current account overdue balance. |
| `urn` | `String` | Unique reference number from a 3rd party enrolment. |
| `billingName` | `String` | The billing name of the account. |
| `billingSubName` | `String` | The billing sub name of the account. |
| `billingEmail` | `String` | The billing email of the account. |
| `billingAddress` | `String` | The billing address of the account. |
| `billingAddressLine1` | `String` |  |
| `billingAddressLine2` | `String` |  |
| `billingAddressLine3` | `String` |  |
| `billingAddressLine4` | `String` |  |
| `billingAddressLine5` | `String` |  |
| `billingAddressPostcode` | `String` |  |
| `billingCountryCode` | `String` |  |
| `billingDeliveryPointIdentifier` | `String` |  |
| `splitBillingAddress` | `[String]` | List of billing address lines. |
| `address` | `RichAddressType` | The billing address of this account, stored in the new libaddressinput-based format. Note that `name` and `organization` are very unlikely to be supplied here; the `billing_name` field on the account itself is generally used for that purpose instead. |
| `portfolio` | `PortfolioType` | The portfolio this account is linked to. |
| `ledgers(ledgerId: ID, ledgerNumber: String, includeDebtLedgers: Boolean)` | `[LedgerType]` | Ledgers provide the foundation of bookkeeping functionality. Similar to a bank account, they allow us to keep track of financial activity on a particular customer account. |
| `metadata` | `[Metadata]` | Metadata associated with the account. |
| `canRequestRefund` | `Boolean` | Whether the account can request a credit refund. |
| `requestRefundEligibility(ledgerNumber: String)` | `RequestRefundEligibilityType` | Details about the eligibility status for requesting a refund. |
| `payments(ledgerId: String, ledgerNumber: String, status: AccountPaymentStatusOptions, reason: PaymentReasonOptions, includePromises: Boolean, before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `AccountPaymentConnectionTypeConnection` | The payments made into an account from a payment instruction. |
| `repayments(statuses: [AccountRepaymentStatusOptions], before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `AccountRepaymentConnectionTypeConnection` | The repayments that have been requested for this account. |
| `paymentPlans(before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `PaymentPlanConnectionTypeConnection` | The payment plans that have been created for this account. |
| `paymentSchedules(activeOnDate: Date, active: Boolean, canCreatePayment: Boolean, includeDormant: Boolean, ledgerType: Int, ledgerId: ID, ledgerNumber: String, reason: PaymentScheduleReasonOptions, before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `PaymentScheduleConnectionTypeConnection` | The schedules that describe how we would expect to take payments for an account on a given month. |
| `paymentForecast(dateTo: Date!, ledgerId: Int, ledgerNumber: String)` | `[PaymentForecastType]` | A list displaying the payment forecast for an account. The list starts from today's date (inclusive). Deprecated: The 'paymentForecast' field is deprecated. Please use 'paginatedPaymentForecast' instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2024-01-03. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-01-01. |
| `paginatedPaymentForecast(dateTo: Date, ledgerId: Int, ledgerNumber: String, before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `PaymentForecastConnectionTypeConnection` | Paginated payment forecasts for an account. Starts from today's date (inclusive). The interface supports `last` but does not guarantee 'lastness'. |
| `referrals(status: ReferralStatus, before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `ReferralConnectionTypeConnection` | The referrals created by this account. |
| `referralsCreated` | `Int` | Number of referrals created by this account. |
| `rewards` | `[RewardType]` | The rewards applied to this account. |
| `activeReferralSchemes` | `ReferralSchemeTypes` | The referral schemes currently active for this account. |
| `transactions(transactionTypes: [TransactionTypeFilter], transactionTypesExcluded: [TransactionTypeFilter], ledgerId: Int, ledgerNumber: String, includeAllLedgers: Boolean, fromDate: Date, toDate: Date, orderBy: TransactionsOrderBy, offset: Int, before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `TransactionConnectionTypeConnection` | Fetch transactions that have taken place on the account. |
| `provisionalTransactions(before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `ProvisionalTransactionConnectionTypeConnection` |  |
| `annualStatements(before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `AnnualStatementConnectionTypeConnection` | Fetch annual statements for the account. |
| `bills(includeBillsWithoutPDF: Boolean, includeOpenStatements: Boolean, includeHeldStatements: Boolean, includeHistoricStatements: Boolean, onlyCurrentEmail: Boolean, ledgerNumber: String, fromDate: Date, toDate: Date, issuedFromDate: Date, issuedToDate: Date, orderBy: BillsOrderBy, offset: Int, before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `BillConnectionTypeConnection` | Fetch issued bills (invoices/statements) for the account. |
| `billingOptions` | `BillingOptionsType` | Information about the account's billing cycle. |
| `billingTriggerConfiguration` | `BillingTriggerConfiguration` | The active billing trigger configuration for the account. |
| `bill(id: ID, identifier: String, billType: BillTypeEnum, ledgerNumber: String)` | `BillInterface` | Fetch a specific issued bill (invoice/statement) for the account. |
| `directDebitInstructions(statuses: [DirectDebitInstructionStatus], before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `DirectDebitInstructionConnectionTypeConnection` | The direct debit instructions of the account |
| `paymentMethods(statuses: [PaymentInstructionStatus], before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `PaymentInstructionConnectionTypeConnection` | The payment instructions of the account. |
| `events(eventTypes: [AccountEventType], before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `AccountEventConnectionTypeConnection` | The account events that were recorded for the account. |
| `applications(status: AccountApplicationStatus, before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `AccountApplicationConnectionTypeConnection` | Applications by this account to become our customer. More recent applications will be listed first. |
| `accountType` | `AccountTypeChoices` | The type of account. |
| `businessType` | `BusinessTypeOptions` | The company type of a business account. Deprecated: The 'businessType' field is deprecated. Use `business.businessType` instead - Marked as deprecated on 2022-03-09. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2024-01-01. |
| `business` | `BusinessType` | Business info related to a business account. |
| `commsDeliveryPreference` | `CommsDeliveryPreference` | The method the account has specified they prefer we contact them. |
| `communicationDeliveryPreference` | `String` |  Deprecated: The 'communicationDeliveryPreference' field is deprecated. Use `commsDeliveryPreference` instead - Marked as deprecated on 2022-05-27. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2024-01-01. |
| `documentAccessibility` | `DocumentAccessibilityChoices` | The document accessibility preference of the account. |
| `references` | `[AccountReferenceType]` | Account references linked to this account. |
| `fileAttachments` | `[AccountFileAttachment]` | Files attached to this account. |
| `paginatedFileAttachments(id: Int, category: String, before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `AccountFileAttachmentConnectionTypeConnection` | Files attached to this account. |
| `maximumRefund(ledgerNumber: String)` | `MaximumRefundType` | The maximum amount a customer is allowed to request as a refund and the reason why that's the maximum amount. |
| `campaigns` | `[AccountCampaignType]` | The campaigns associated with an account. |
| `isInHardship` | `Boolean` | True if there is an active Hardship Agreement for this account. False otherwise. |
| `activeHardshipAgreements` | `[HardshipAgreementType]` | List of active hardship agreements for the user when is_in_hardship is True. |
| `notes` | `[AccountNoteType]` | Notes for the account. |
| `contributionAgreements` | `[ContributionAgreementType]` | Contribution agreements for account. |
| `assistanceAgreements` | `[AssistanceAgreementType]` | Assistance agreements for account. |
| `debtCollectionProceedings` | `[DebtCollectionProceedingType]` | Debt collection proceedings for account. |
| `createdAt` | `DateTime` | The datetime that the account was originally created. |
| `preferredLanguageForComms` | `String` | The language that the account preferred for communications. |
| `consents` | `[ConsentType!]!` | Consents linked to this account. |
| `reminders(before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `AccountReminderConnectionTypeConnection` | The reminders associated with an account. |
| `customerAssets` | `[CustomerAssetType]` | Get customer assets for an account. |
| `properties(activeFrom: DateTime)` | `[Property]` | Properties linked to the account now and in the future. |
| `marketSupplyAgreements(id: ID, active: Boolean, before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `AgreementConnection` | Retrieve all market supply agreements under this account. Note that when `active` is set to false it actually means 'return both active and inactive agreements'. |
| `canModifyPayments` | `CanModifyPaymentsType` | Data about whether or not an account can modify their payments. |
| `consentData` | `GenericScalar` | A JSON object containing consent information. |
| `paymentSchedule` | `PaymentScheduleType` | Current active payment schedule detail of the account. |
| `paymentInstructions(statuses: [PaymentInstructionStatus], before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `PaymentInstructionConnectionTypeConnection` | The payment instructions of the account |
| `paymentPreferences(before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `PaymentPreferenceConnectionTypeConnection` | The customer's preferred payment methods. |
| `availableDemandResponseCampaignsForRegistration` | `[String]` | A list of available demand response campaigns in which this account can participate. |
| `demandResponseCampaignParticipants` | `[DemandResponseCampaignParticipantType]` | The demand response campaigns associated with an account. |
| `canBeWithdrawn` | `Boolean` | Check whether the account can be withdrawn. |
| `hasActiveAgreement` | `Boolean` | Check whether the account has an active energy agreement. |
| `hasFutureAgreement` | `Boolean` | Check whether the account has a future energy agreement. |
| `lifelineAgencyApplication` | `LifelineAgencyApplication` | Lifeline Agency application. |

### Field arguments

#### `complaints`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `before` | `String` |  |
| `after` | `String` |  |
| `first` | `Int` |  |
| `last` | `Int` |  |

#### `balance`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `includeAllLedgers` | `Boolean` | If this variable is set to true, the balance will be calculated based on the sum of balances on all ledgers configured to contribute to this account's balance. Otherwise, only the main ledger's balance will be fetched (legacy behaviour). If you are unsure, set this value to true. Default: `false`. |

#### `ledgers`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `ledgerId` | `ID` | The ledger to return. Deprecated: The 'ledgerId' field is deprecated. Please use 'ledgerNumber' instead. This is in the form of 'L-123456789A' - Marked as deprecated on 2024-10-22. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-06-25. |
| `ledgerNumber` | `String` | The ledger to return by its number. |
| `includeDebtLedgers` | `Boolean` | If this variable is set to false, debt ledgerswill be filtered out of the ledgers list. Default: `true`. |

#### `requestRefundEligibility`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `ledgerNumber` | `String` | The ledger number to check refund eligibility. |

#### `payments`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `ledgerId` | `String` | The id of the ledger to return payments from. Deprecated: The 'ledgerId' field is deprecated. Please use 'ledgerNumber' instead. This is in the form of 'L-123456789A' - Marked as deprecated on 2024-10-22. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-06-25. |
| `ledgerNumber` | `String` | **WARNING: Will be mandatory in future versions** The number of the ledger to return payments from. |
| `status` | `AccountPaymentStatusOptions` |  |
| `reason` | `PaymentReasonOptions` | Filter for payments that were taken for a particular reason. |
| `includePromises` | `Boolean` | Whether to include payment promises (of any kind: made, broken or fulfilled) or not. The default is to include them. Default: `true`. |
| `before` | `String` |  |
| `after` | `String` |  |
| `first` | `Int` |  |
| `last` | `Int` |  |

#### `repayments`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `statuses` | `[AccountRepaymentStatusOptions]` | Only return repayments whose status matches one of these statuses. |
| `before` | `String` |  |
| `after` | `String` |  |
| `first` | `Int` |  |
| `last` | `Int` |  |

#### `paymentPlans`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `before` | `String` |  |
| `after` | `String` |  |
| `first` | `Int` |  |
| `last` | `Int` |  |

#### `paymentSchedules`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `activeOnDate` | `Date` |  |
| `active` | `Boolean` |  |
| `canCreatePayment` | `Boolean` |  Deprecated: The 'canCreatePayment' field is deprecated. Please use 'includeDormant' instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2023-12-06. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2024-12-06. |
| `includeDormant` | `Boolean` | If false, we remove the currently valid schedule if it has already fulfilled its purpose and will have no further impact on customer payments, along with any schedules which are not valid from today. Default: `true`. |
| `ledgerType` | `Int` | The ledger to return transactions from. |
| `ledgerId` | `ID` | The ledger id to return the payment schedules from. Deprecated: The 'ledgerId' field is deprecated. Please use 'ledgerNumber' instead. This is in the form of 'L-123456789A' - Marked as deprecated on 2024-10-22. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-06-25. |
| `ledgerNumber` | `String` | The ledger number to return the payment schedules from. |
| `reason` | `PaymentScheduleReasonOptions` |  |
| `before` | `String` |  |
| `after` | `String` |  |
| `first` | `Int` |  |
| `last` | `Int` |  |

#### `paymentForecast`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `dateTo` | `Date!` | The end date to retrieve forecasts for. This end date is inclusive. |
| `ledgerId` | `Int` | The ledger to return payment forecasts from. Defaults to the main ledger when no ID is passed. Deprecated: The 'ledgerId' field is deprecated. Please use 'ledgerNumber' instead. This is in the form of 'L-123456789A' - Marked as deprecated on 2024-10-22. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-06-25. |
| `ledgerNumber` | `String` | The number of the ledger to return payment forecasts from. Defaults to the main ledger when no number is passed. |

#### `paginatedPaymentForecast`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `dateTo` | `Date` | The end date to retrieve forecasts for. This end date is inclusive. |
| `ledgerId` | `Int` | The ledger to return payment forecasts from. Defaults to the main ledger when no ID is passed. Deprecated: The 'ledgerId' field is deprecated. Please use 'ledgerNumber' instead. This is in the form of 'L-123456789A' - Marked as deprecated on 2024-10-22. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-06-25. |
| `ledgerNumber` | `String` | The number of the ledger to return payment forecasts from. Defaults to the main ledger when no number is passed. |
| `before` | `String` |  |
| `after` | `String` |  |
| `first` | `Int` |  |
| `last` | `Int` |  |

#### `referrals`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `status` | `ReferralStatus` | Only return referrals with the specified status. Return all referrals by default. |
| `before` | `String` |  |
| `after` | `String` |  |
| `first` | `Int` |  |
| `last` | `Int` |  |

#### `transactions`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `transactionTypes` | `[TransactionTypeFilter]` | Include only these specific transaction types in the result. Default: `[]`. |
| `transactionTypesExcluded` | `[TransactionTypeFilter]` | Exclude these specific transaction types from the result. Default: `[]`. |
| `ledgerId` | `Int` | The ledger to return transactions from. Deprecated: The 'ledgerId' field is deprecated. Please use 'ledgerNumber' instead. This is in the form of 'L-123456789A' - Marked as deprecated on 2024-10-22. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-06-25. |
| `ledgerNumber` | `String` | The number of the ledger to return transactions from. |
| `includeAllLedgers` | `Boolean` | In a multi-ledger scenario, include all ledgers' transactions if `true`. Analogously, if `false` and no `ledgerId` or `ledger_number` argument is present, the list of transactions defaults to the main ledger (legacy behaviour). |
| `fromDate` | `Date` | Optional date representing the beginning of the postedDate range filter. This date value is inclusive. |
| `toDate` | `Date` | Optional date representing the end of the postedDate range filter. This date value is exclusive. |
| `orderBy` | `TransactionsOrderBy` | The order in which to return the transactions. Default: `POSTED_DATE_DESC`. |
| `offset` | `Int` |  |
| `before` | `String` |  |
| `after` | `String` |  |
| `first` | `Int` |  |
| `last` | `Int` |  |
