| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `before` | `String` |  |
| `after` | `String` |  |
| `first` | `Int` |  |
| `last` | `Int` |  |

#### `annualStatements`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `before` | `String` |  |
| `after` | `String` |  |
| `first` | `Int` |  |
| `last` | `Int` |  |

#### `bills`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `includeBillsWithoutPDF` | `Boolean` | Include bills without PDFs. Default: `false`. |
| `includeOpenStatements` | `Boolean` | Include open statements. This flag needs to be used along with includeBillsWithoutPDF=false otherwise results will prove unexpected. Default: `false`. |
| `includeHeldStatements` | `Boolean` | Include held statements within the results. Default: `false`. |
| `includeHistoricStatements` | `Boolean` | Include pre-Kraken / historical statements within the results. Default: `true`. |
| `onlyCurrentEmail` | `Boolean` | Only include bills emailed to the current user's email. Default: `false`. |
| `ledgerNumber` | `String` | The number of a ledger for the bill. When provided, only period- or item-based documents for this account that are linked to that ledger are returned; collective bills and legacy bills are excluded. Historic/pre-Kraken bills are unaffected by this filter and are included or excluded solely by includeHistoricStatements. |
| `fromDate` | `Date` | Optional date representing the beginning of the search results. This date value is inclusive. |
| `toDate` | `Date` | Optional date representing the end of the search results. This date value is exclusive. |
| `issuedFromDate` | `Date` | Optional date representing the beginning of the search results based on issued date. This date value is inclusive. |
| `issuedToDate` | `Date` | Optional date representing the end of the search results based on issued date. This date value is exclusive. |
| `orderBy` | `BillsOrderBy` | The order in which to return the bills. Default: `FROM_DATE_DESC`. |
| `offset` | `Int` |  |
| `before` | `String` |  |
| `after` | `String` |  |
| `first` | `Int` |  |
| `last` | `Int` |  |

#### `bill`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `id` | `ID` | The unique identifier of the bill. |
| `identifier` | `String` | The unique identifier of the bill. A pending billing document will not have an identifier yet. And not all finalized billing documents will have an identifier. Prefer using the id field unless advised by Kraken. |
| `billType` | `BillTypeEnum` |  |
| `ledgerNumber` | `String` | The number of the ledger for the bill. When provided, only the period- or item-based documentfor this account that is linked to that ledger is returned; pre-kraken, collective bills, and legacy bills are excluded. |

#### `directDebitInstructions`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `statuses` | `[DirectDebitInstructionStatus]` | Filter the direct debit instructions by status |
| `before` | `String` |  |
| `after` | `String` |  |
| `first` | `Int` |  |
| `last` | `Int` |  |

#### `paymentMethods`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `statuses` | `[PaymentInstructionStatus]` | Filter the payment instructions by status. |
| `before` | `String` |  |
| `after` | `String` |  |

| `last` | `Int` |  |

| `last` | `Int` |  |

| `after` | `String` |  |

| `last` | `Int` |  |

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

| Field | Returns | Description |

| `edgeCount` | `Int!` | Number of nodes in the edge. |

## Type `AccountApplicationConnectionTypeEdge`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

A Relay edge containing a `AccountApplicationConnectionType` and its cursor.

## Type `AccountApplicationType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `status` | `AccountApplicationStatus!` |  |
| `salesChannel` | `String!` |  |
| `salesSubchannel` | `String` | The sales subchannel used when signing up. This could for example be a price comparison site. |
| `dateOfSale` | `Date` | Date at which this account decided to switch to us. |
| `coolingOffEndDate` | `Date` | Last day of the cooling off period. Barring changes or objections, the account will be gained on the next business day after this date. This value will only be returned for current applications. |
| `isMigrated` | `Boolean` | Whether this account application represents a migration into the current system or a regular gain. |
| `migrationSource` | `String` | The source system for a migrated account. This could be the previous supplier or the previous account management system. |
| `preferredSsd` | `Date` | Preferred supply start date. If null, it means ASAP. |

## Type `AccountUser`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

User objects are the core of the authentication system. They typically represent a customer who manages a portfolio of one or more accounts.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `id` | `ID!` |  |
| `number` | `String` | A code that uniquely identifies the account user. |
| `givenName` | `String!` |  |
| `familyName` | `String!` |  |
| `email` | `String!` |  |
| `mobile` | `String!` |  |
| `landline` | `String!` |  |
| `title` | `String` |  |
| `pronouns` | `String` | The user's pronouns e.g. 'she/her', 'he/him', 'they/them'. |
| `isDeceased` | `Boolean!` | Designates whether this user is deceased. |
| `liveSecretKey` | `String` | The user's secret key to access the Developer API. |
| `createdAt` | `DateTime!` |  |
| `portfolios(allowedBrandCodes: [BrandChoices], restrictToPublicFacingBrands: Boolean, before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `PortfolioConnectionTypeConnection` | List of portfolios that the user is linked to via their portfolio roles. |
| `accounts(allowedBrandCodes: [BrandChoices], restrictToPublicFacingBrands: Boolean, restrictToAccountNumbers: [String], excludeAccountTypes: [AccountTypeChoices], excludeAccountsWithoutAgreements: Boolean)` | `[AccountInterface]` | List of accounts that the user is linked to either via portfolio role or account role. |
| `address` | `RichAddressType` | This user's address. |
| `dateOfBirth` | `Date` | AccountUser's date of birth. |
| `label` | `String` | A free text field to help identifying the customer (e.g. for a job title). |
| `isActive` | `Boolean` | Whether this user is active. |
| `details` | `[AccountUserDetailType]` | List of details linked to this user. |
| `permissions` | `[AccountUserPermission]` | Holds information about the permissions of the current viewer. |
| `displayName` | `String` | We recommend you use fullName instead of this field. Deprecated: The 'displayName' field is deprecated. Please use fullName instead of this field. - Marked as deprecated on 2019-12-11. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2024-01-01. |
| `firstName` | `String` | We recommend you use preferredName or fullName instead of this field. Deprecated: The 'firstName' field is deprecated. Use 'givenName' instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2020-09-23. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2023-06-05. |
| `lastName` | `String` | We recommend you use preferredName or fullName instead of this field. Deprecated: The 'lastName' field is deprecated. Use 'familyName' instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2020-09-23. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2023-06-05. |
| `fullName` | `String` | The user's full name. |
| `preferredName` | `String` | The user's preferred name. |
| `portfolioId` | `ID` | We recommend you use portfolioIds instead of this field. Deprecated: The 'portfolioId' field is deprecated. Please use 'portfolioIds' instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2022-08-04. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2024-01-01. |
| `portfolioIds(allowedBrandCodes: [BrandChoices], restrictToPublicFacingBrands: Boolean)` | `[ID]` | List of portfolio ids that the user is linked to via their portfolio roles. |
| `businesses(before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `BusinessConnectionTypeConnection` | List of businesses that the user has access to through their granted roles. |
| `specialCircumstances` | `SpecialCircumstancesType` |  |
| `preferences` | `AccountUserCommsPreferences` |  |
| `landlinePhoneNumber` | `String` | The user's landline phone number. Deprecated: The 'landlinePhoneNumber' field is deprecated. Use 'landline' instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2021-03-22. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2024-01-01. |
| `alternativePhoneNumbers` | `[String]` | List of alternative phone numbers for the account user. |
| `hasFamilyIssues` | `Boolean` | Whether there are family issues. |
| `isInHardship` | `Boolean` | True if user is linked to an account with an active hardship agreement. |
| `accountUserRoles(accountNumber: String)` | `[AccountUserRoleType]` | List of roles a user has for each account they're linked to. |
| `portfolioUserRoles(portfolioNumber: String, accountNumber: String)` | `[PortfolioUserRoleType]` | List of roles a user has for each portfolio they're linked to. |
| `consents` | `[ConsentType!]!` | Consents linked to this user. |
| `paymentMethods(validAt: DateTime, statuses: [PaymentInstructionStatus], before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `PaymentInstructionConnectionTypeConnection` | List payment instructions linked to this user. |
| `accountUserMeta` | `AccountUserMeta` | Additional user details, if they exist. |
| `externalIdAccountLinks` | `[ExternalIdAccountLink!]!` | List of currently active (LINKED) external vendor ID linkages for this user. Due to database constraints, each user can only have one active linkage per vendor. |

### Field arguments

#### `portfolios`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `allowedBrandCodes` | `[BrandChoices]` | Optionally filter the user's portfolios to only return those linked to specified brands. |
| `restrictToPublicFacingBrands` | `Boolean` | Optionally restrict the user portfolios to only return those linked to public facing brands. |
| `before` | `String` |  |
| `after` | `String` |  |
| `first` | `Int` |  |
| `last` | `Int` |  |

#### `accounts`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `allowedBrandCodes` | `[BrandChoices]` | Optionally filter the user's accounts to only return those linked to portfolios on the specified brands. |
| `restrictToPublicFacingBrands` | `Boolean` | Optionally restrict user accounts to only return those linked to portfolios on public facing brands. |
| `restrictToAccountNumbers` | `[String]` | Optionally restrict user accounts to only return those with the specified account numbers. |
| `excludeAccountTypes` | `[AccountTypeChoices]` | Optionally exclude accounts with any of the given account types. |
| `excludeAccountsWithoutAgreements` | `Boolean` | Optionally exclude accounts that have never had an agreement. |

#### `portfolioIds`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `allowedBrandCodes` | `[BrandChoices]` | Optionally filter the user's portfolios to only return those linked to specified brands. |
| `restrictToPublicFacingBrands` | `Boolean` | Optionally restrict the user portfolios to only return those linked to public facing brands. |

#### `businesses`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `before` | `String` |  |
| `after` | `String` |  |
| `first` | `Int` |  |
| `last` | `Int` |  |

#### `accountUserRoles`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `accountNumber` | `String` | Optionally filter the user's account roles to only return those linked to specific accounts. |

#### `portfolioUserRoles`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `portfolioNumber` | `String` | Optionally filter the portfolio's user roles to only return those linked to a specific portfolio. |
| `accountNumber` | `String` | Return the user portfolio roles for this account's portfolio. |

#### `paymentMethods`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `validAt` | `DateTime` | Optionally return only payment instructions valid at the given datetime. |
| `statuses` | `[PaymentInstructionStatus]` | Optionally filter the payment instructions by status. |
| `before` | `String` |  |
| `after` | `String` |  |
| `first` | `Int` |  |
| `last` | `Int` |  |

## Type `AccountUserCommsPreferences`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Information about the preferences set up for a user.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `isOptedInToClientMessages` | `Boolean` | Whether a user has opted in to receive messages from the client or client group. For example, for Octopus Energy this describes whether a user is opted in to offers from Octopus Investments. |
| `isOptedInToOfferMessages` | `Boolean` | Whether a user has opted in to receive messages offering discounts or other services not directly related to the services the client provides. |
| `isOptedInToRecommendedMessages` | `Boolean` | Whether a user has opted in to receive messages we recommend they read, but are not vital to the utilities the client provides. For example, these could be reminders that the client will take a payment. |
| `isOptedInToUpdateMessages` | `Boolean` | Whether a user has opted in to receive messages updating them on client activities. |
| `isOptedInToThirdPartyMessages` | `Boolean` | Whether a user has opted in to receive messages from the client's preferred third parties. |
| `emailFormat` | `EmailFormats` | What format the user would like to receive their emails in. |
| `isUsingInvertedEmailColours` | `Boolean` | Whether a user has opted to have inverted colours in their emails. This is currently only relevant to the Octopus Energy brand, whose emails have a dark background by default. |
| `fontSizeMultiplier` | `Float` | This setting allows the user to adjust the default font size of the communications sent to them. |
| `isOptedInMeterReadingConfirmations` | `Boolean` | Whether the user has opted in to receive meter reading confirmation emails. |
| `isOptedInToSmsMessages` | `Boolean` | Whether the user has opted in to receive SMS messages. |
| `preferredHoldMusic` | `Songs` | Song which will be used as hold music for the user. |
| `smsOptInLastChangeDate` | `DateTime` | The date the SMS opt-in was last changed. |
| `isOptedInToLifeSupportCall` | `Boolean` | Whether the user is opted in to life support call. |

## Type `AddChildToProperty`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Add a child property to a parent property in a hierarchy.

If the child is already in the hierarchy with a different parent, it will be
reparented. If the child is already a child of the specified parent, this
operation is idempotent and does nothing.

The possible errors that can be raised are:

- KT-CT-1111: Unauthorized.
- KT-CT-6622: Unauthorized.
- KT-CT-6634: Unable to add child to property.
- KT-CT-1113: Disabled GraphQL field requested.
- KT-CT-1112: 'Authorization' header not provided.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `possibleErrors` | `[PossibleErrorType]` | Field with the possible errors of the query/mutation. Deprecated: The 'possibleErrors' field is deprecated. Please use the 'possibleErrors' query or the 'X-Kraken-Possible-Errors' header instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2025-01-31. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-03-01. |
| `child` | `PropertyType` | The child property that was added to the parent. |

## Type `AddressFieldConfigType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Configuration for a single field in an address form.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `name` | `String!` | Machine identifier for the field, e.g. 'locality' or 'postal_code'. |
| `label` | `String!` | Country-specific human-readable label, e.g. 'Suburb' or 'Postcode'. |
| `fieldType` | `AddressFieldTypeEnum!` | Input widget type to render for this field. |
| `validation` | `AddressFieldValidationRuleType!` | Client-side validation constraints for this field. |
| `options` | `[AddressFieldOptionType!]` | Available options for SELECT fields. Null for all other field types. |
| `userEditable` | `Boolean!` | Whether the user can interact with this field. False for hidden fields. |
| `default` | `String` | Pre-filled seed value shown before any user interaction. Null if not set. |
| `value` | `String` | Submitted or pre-loaded form value. Null if not set. |
| `errors` | `[String!]!` | Validation error messages for this field. Empty when the field is valid or no validation has been run. |

## Type `AddressFieldDescriptorType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Describes the structure of an address form for a given country, including all field groups, field configurations, and validation rules.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `fieldGroups` | `[AddressFieldGroupType!]!` | Ordered list of field groups making up the address form. |

## Type `AddressFieldGroupType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

A named group of address fields forming a logical section of the form.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `name` | `String!` | Machine identifier for the group, e.g. 'address_fields' or 'country_selection'. |
| `label` | `String` | Optional UI section heading. Null for unlabelled groups. |
| `fields` | `[AddressFieldConfigType!]!` | Ordered list of fields in this group. |

## Type `AddressFieldOptionType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

A single selectable option for a SELECT address field.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `value` | `String!` | The raw value submitted with the form, e.g. 'NSW'. |
| `label` | `String!` | Human-readable text shown in the dropdown, e.g. 'New South Wales'. |

## Type `AddressFieldValidationRuleType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Client-side validation constraints for an address field. These rules can be enforced without a server round-trip.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `required` | `Boolean!` | Whether the field must be filled before submitting. |
| `maxLength` | `Int` | Maximum number of characters allowed. Null if no limit. |
| `regex` | `String` | Regular expression the submitted value must match. Null if unrestricted. |

## Type `AddressOutput`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `line1` | `String` | Line 1 of address. |
| `postcode` | `String` | Postcode of billing address. |
| `countryCode` | `String` | Country code of billing address. |
| `line2` | `String` | Line 2 of address. |
| `line3` | `String` | Line 3 of address. |
| `line4` | `String` | Line 4 of address. |
| `line5` | `String` | Line 5 of address. |

Affiliate link for the organization.

## Type `AffiliateOrganisationType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `id` | `ID!` |  |
| `number` | `String` | Unique identifier for the organisation in the format O-XXXXXXXX. |
| `name` | `String!` |  |
| `contactEmail` | `String!` | The primary contact email for the organisation. |
| `canRenewTariffs` | `Boolean` | Allow performing tariff renewals via API. |
| `defaultAccountType` | `AccountTypeChoices` | Default Account Type. |
| `allowAlternativePaymentMethods` | `Boolean` | Is this partner allowed to specify payment methods other than Direct Debit in the import csv or API. |
| `canRegisterBusinessMeterPoints` | `Boolean` | Are meter point registrations limited for profile classes 1 and 2 for registrations from csv or API. |
| `canRegisterPortfolioAccounts` | `Boolean` | Allow registration requests with exiting account user emails to add to the portfolio belonging to the account user. |
| `canRegisterCustomersWithoutEmailAddress` | `Boolean` | Allow registration requests with customers without an email address. |
| `canUseIvrSupportApi` | `Boolean` | Allow this partner access to the IVR support API (modify their own IVR handling through third party 'IVR Flow Editor'). |
| `skipMeterPointAddressValidation` | `Boolean` | Allow this partner to skip validation that ensures all meter points belong to the same address. |
| `salesChannel` | `SalesChannelChoices` | Sales Channel. Deprecated: The 'salesChannel' field is deprecated. Please use salesChannelCode instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2025-07-17. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-10-17. |
| `salesChannelCode` | `String` | Sales Channel Code. |
| `isFieldSalesOnlyProduct` | `Boolean` | Restrict to field-sales-only products? This is only allowed for the 'field-sales' and 'events' sales channels. |

## Type `Agreement`

| Field | Returns | Description |

| `agreedTo` | `DateTime` | The datetime the agreement was terminated. |

| `addonRates` | `[AddOnRateType]` | List of add-on rates on the agreement. |
| `product` | `Product` |  |
| `params` | `GenericScalar` | The agreement additional params. |

| `transactionId` | `Int!` | ID of the allocated transaction. |
| `transactionType` | `TransactionTypes!` | The type of the transaction. |
| `transactionAmount` | `Int!` | The amount of the transaction. A positive amount indicates money received from the customer (payments, credits). A negative amount indicates money paid to the customer (repayments). |
| `allocationAmount` | `Int!` | The amount of the transaction that has been allocated to the billing document. A positive amount indicates money received from the customer (payments, credits). A negative amount indicates money paid to the customer (repayments). |
| `allocationReason` | `String` | Reason for the allocation intention. |

| `pointsAwarded` | `Int` | The number of loyalty points that were awarded. |
| `ledgerEntry` | `LoyaltyPointLedgerEntryType` | The ledger entry for the awarded loyalty points. |

## Type `BackendScreenEvent`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Returns an Action to perform, e.g. a screen to load.

BackendScreenEvents are specific types of Action which trigger a mutation in the Kraken backend.
They return an action (any type), such as a ScreenActionType (which is then used to load the next screen).
Any action registered in the registry should really be an "event" with some side-effect in the backend.

The possible errors that can be raised are:

- KT-CT-1111: Unauthorized.
- KT-CT-8002: No event found.
- KT-CT-8003: Event has no execute function.
- KT-CT-8004: Error executing event in the backend.
- KT-CT-8007: Incorrect or missing parameters for backend screen event.
- KT-GB-9310: Account ineligible for joining Octoplus.
- KT-CT-1113: Disabled GraphQL field requested.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `possibleErrors` | `[PossibleErrorType]` | Field with the possible errors of the query/mutation. Deprecated: The 'possibleErrors' field is deprecated. Please use the 'possibleErrors' query or the 'X-Kraken-Possible-Errors' header instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2025-01-31. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-03-01. |
| `action` | `ActionType` | An action to perform. |

## Type `BackendScreenEventActionType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

An action which triggers some event in the Kraken backend.

**Implements:** `ActionInterface`, `IdentifiableInterface`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `typeName` | `String` | The name of the action object's type. |
| `id` | `ID` | Unique identifier of the object. |
| `typename` | `String` | The name of the object's type. |
| `eventId` | `String!` | The ID of the event to trigger. |
| `params` | `[BackendScreenParam]!` | List of key-value pairs to pass as parameters to the event. |

A key-value pair (both Strings) which is passed as a parameter to a screen.

| `value` | `String!` |  |

## Type `BillCharge`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

A charge to the customer from the energy retailer.

**Implements:** `BillTransactionType`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `id` | `ID` | The unique identifier for the transaction. |
| `postedDate` | `Date` | The date the transaction was posted. |
| `createdAt` | `DateTime` | The date time when the transaction is created. |
| `amounts` | `TransactionAmountType` | The net, tax and gross amounts for the transaction. Note: for payments and repayments, only the net amount is returned. |
| `title` | `String` | A user readable string that indicates what this transaction relates to. |
| `note` | `String` | Returns the note field value for the transaction, which contains additional info. |
| `reasonCode` | `String` | Returns the reason. |
| `consumption` | `Consumption` | If this charge is for consumption of a good or service, this field will contain details of how much was consumed. Omitted in cases where the charge is not for consumption, or where consumption information is not available (e.g. for some older records). |
| `detail` | `ChargeDetail` | Supporting information about this charge (if any is available). |

| `edgeCount` | `Int!` | Number of nodes in the edge. |

**Implements:** `BillTransactionType`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `id` | `ID` | The unique identifier for the transaction. |
| `postedDate` | `Date` | The date the transaction was posted. |
| `createdAt` | `DateTime` | The date time when the transaction is created. |
| `amounts` | `TransactionAmountType` | The net, tax and gross amounts for the transaction. Note: for payments and repayments, only the net amount is returned. |
| `title` | `String` | A user readable string that indicates what this transaction relates to. |
| `note` | `String` | Returns the note field value for the transaction, which contains additional info. |
| `reasonCode` | `String` | Returns the reason. |

## Type `BillDueDateType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Represents bill due dates to be applied in a contract.

**Implements:** `TermInterface`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `type` | `NonEmptyString` | The type of the term. |
| `displayName` | `NonEmptyString` | The display name of the term. |
| `description` | `NonEmptyString` | The description of the term. |
| `identifier` | `NonEmptyString` | The identifier of the term. |
| `isVariable` | `Boolean` | Whether the term is variable. |
| `numberOfDays` | `Int` | The number of days to pay a bill from issue date, after which the debt becomes delinquent. |
| `typeOfDays` | `DayType` | The type of day to consider (WORKING or CALENDAR). |

## Type `BillPayment`

| `amounts` | `TransactionAmountType` | The net, tax and gross amounts for the transaction. Note: for payments and repayments, only the net amount is returned. |
| `title` | `String` | A user readable string that indicates what this transaction relates to. |
| `note` | `String` | Returns the note field value for the transaction, which contains additional info. |
| `reasonCode` | `String` | Returns the reason. |

## Type `BillRepresentationConnectionTypeEdge`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

A Relay edge containing a `BillRepresentationConnectionType` and its cursor.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `node` | `BillRepresentationType` | The item at the end of the edge |
| `cursor` | `String!` | A cursor for use in pagination |

## Type `BillRepresentationContextType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Provides the rendering context data used to generate a bill representation, along with its associated JSON Schema metadata.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `data` | `GenericScalar` | The raw template context used to render the bill representation. Returns null if the context data is unavailable. |
| `schema` | `GenericScalar` | The schema defining the expected structure of the `data` field. This is populated when the schema type is 'STRICT', and empty when the schema type is 'NONE'. |
| `schemaType` | `String` | The level of explicit structural typing applied to the context data. 'STRICT' indicates that the data conforms to a defined, typed schema; 'NONE' indicates that the data is untyped and no schema is enforced. |
| `templateCode` | `String` | The unique code of the template associated with this context. |

## Type `BillRepresentationType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

representations are associated with a bill files and can be used to provide additional information to the customer.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `code` | `String` | The type of representation. |
| `version` | `Int` | The version of the representation. |
| `temporaryUrl` | `String` | The `TemporaryURL` type represents a temporary URL at which the file is available. It is intended for redirection purposes, NOT persistence in any form. (e.g. inclusion in emails or the body of a web page). |
| `temporaryUrlExpiresAt` | `DateTime` | The expiry datetime field of the temporary URL. |
| `filename` | `String` | The name of the file. |
| `context` | `BillRepresentationContextType` | The rendering context data and schema associated with this bill representation. Returns null if no context record exists. |

## Type `BillingDocumentIssuanceFrequencyType`

Represents billing document issuance frequency to be applied during a contract.

| Field | Returns | Description |

| `displayName` | `NonEmptyString` | The display name of the term. |
| `description` | `NonEmptyString` | The description of the term. |
| `identifier` | `NonEmptyString` | The identifier of the term. |
| `isVariable` | `Boolean` | Whether the term can be amended after creation. |
| `frequency` | `String` | Billing frequency. |
| `periodStartDay` | `Int` | Start day of the billing period. |
| `periodStartMonth` | `Int` | Start month of the billing period. |
| `multiplier` | `Int` | Multiplier applied to the frequency. |

## Type `BillingDocumentPositionType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `dueDate` | `Date!` | The date when the payment is due for the billing document. |
| `expectedAmount` | `Int!` | The expected amount for the billing document (in minor currency units). |
| `remainingAmount` | `Int!` | The amount that remains to be paid for the billing document (in minor currency units). |
| `allocationIntentions` | `[AllocationIntentionType]!` | Allocation intentions for the billing document. |
| `allocations` | `[AllocationType]!` | Allocations for the billing document. |

## Type `BillingOperationFrequency`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

A billing operation frequency definition.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `operationType` | `BillingTriggerOperationType!` | The type of billing operation. |
| `targetType` | `BillingTriggerTargetType!` | The type of target this definition applies to. |
| `frequency` | `BillingTriggerFrequency!` | The billing frequency. |
| `multiplier` | `Int!` | The frequency multiplier (e.g., 2 for bi-monthly). |
| `triggerAtStartDay` | `Int!` | Day of the month when billing is triggered (1-31). |
| `triggerAtStartMonth` | `Int!` | Month of the year when billing starts (1-12). |
| `temporalParams` | `[BillingOperationTemporalParamsType!]!` | Temporal parameters for operation parameters. |

## Type `BillingOperationTemporalParamsType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Temporal parameters for billing frequency operations.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `paramKey` | `String!` | The key of the parameter (e.g., charge_to). |
| `startDay` | `Int!` | Day of the month (1-31). |
| `startMonth` | `Int!` | Month of the year (1-12). |

## Type `BillingOptionsType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Information about an account's billing schedule.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `periodStartDay` | `Int` | The day of the month on which the account's billing period should start. |
| `periodLength` | `AccountBillingOptionsPeriodLength` |  |
| `periodLengthMultiplier` | `Int` |  |
| `isFixed` | `Boolean!` | If true, this account is billed on specific day of a regular cycle. If false, the billing schedule is flexible, depending on when meter readings are submitted. |
| `currentBillingPeriodStartDate` | `Date` | The date on which the current billing cycle started. |
| `currentBillingPeriodEndDate` | `Date` | The date on which the current billing cycle will end. Null if the account is on flexible billing. |
| `nextBillingDate` | `Date` | The next date on which this account will next be billed. This is the same as the start date for their next bill cycle. Null if the account is on flexible billing. |

## Type `BillingTriggerConfiguration`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

A billing trigger configuration with its effective period and operation frequencies.

This represents a complete billing configuration for a target, including effective period
and what operations should be performed at what frequencies.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `effectiveFrom` | `DateTime!` | When this configuration becomes effective. |
| `effectiveTo` | `DateTime` | When this configuration stops being effective (null if no end date). |
| `isActive` | `Boolean!` | Whether this configuration is currently active. |
| `targetType` | `BillingTriggerTargetType!` | The type of target this configuration applies to. |
| `operationFrequencies` | `[BillingOperationFrequency!]!` | List of billing operation frequencies in this configuration. |
| `nextIssueDate` | `Date` | Next date when a billing document will be issued (null if not calculable). |

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

A reference to a billing trigger target.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|

| `number` | `String` | The account or portfolio number (null for ledgers). |
| `id` | `ID!` | The database ID of the target. |

## Type `BlockRepaymentSubmission`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Block a repayment from being submitted.

The possible errors that can be raised are:

- KT-CT-3944: Account repayment does not exist.
- KT-CT-3946: Unable to block a repayment from being submitted.
- KT-CT-3950: The provided reason text is too long.
- KT-CT-1113: Disabled GraphQL field requested.
- KT-CT-1111: Unauthorized.
- KT-CT-1112: 'Authorization' header not provided.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `possibleErrors` | `[PossibleErrorType]` | Field with the possible errors of the query/mutation. Deprecated: The 'possibleErrors' field is deprecated. Please use the 'possibleErrors' query or the 'X-Kraken-Possible-Errors' header instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2025-01-31. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-03-01. |
| `repaymentId` | `ID` | The repayment ID. |
| `repaymentIntervention` | `RepaymentInterventionType` | Resulting Repayment Intervention details. |

## Type `BulkAwardLoyaltyPoints`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Bulk award Loyalty Points.

The possible errors that can be raised are:

- KT-CT-1111: Unauthorized.
- KT-CT-9202: Loyalty Points adapter not configured.
- KT-CT-9212: Points exceed maximum limit.
- KT-CT-9221: Idempotency key already used on ledger entry.
- KT-CT-9224: Duplicate idempotency keys provided in requested awards.
- KT-CT-9225: Bulk award batch size exceeds the maximum limit.
- KT-CT-1113: Disabled GraphQL field requested.
- KT-CT-1112: 'Authorization' header not provided.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `possibleErrors` | `[PossibleErrorType]` | Field with the possible errors of the query/mutation. Deprecated: The 'possibleErrors' field is deprecated. Please use the 'possibleErrors' query or the 'X-Kraken-Possible-Errors' header instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2025-01-31. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-03-01. |
| `inserted` | `[BulkAwardLoyaltyPointsInsertedItemResult]` | Successfully inserted loyalty point awards. |
| `failed` | `[BulkAwardLoyaltyPointsFailedItemResult]` | Failed loyalty point awards. |

## Type `BulkAwardLoyaltyPointsFailedItemResult`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `accountNumber` | `String` | The account number for this failed item. |
| `idempotencyKey` | `UUID` | The idempotency key for this failed item. |
| `errorCode` | `String` | Error code for failed items. |
| `errorMessage` | `String` | Error message for failed items. |

## Type `BulkAwardLoyaltyPointsInsertedItemResult`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `accountNumber` | `String` | The account number for this item. |
| `pointsAwarded` | `Int` | The number of points awarded for this item when successful. |
| `ledgerEntry` | `LoyaltyPointLedgerEntryType` | The created loyalty point ledger entry when successful. |

## Type `BusinessSegmentPeriodType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `id` | `ID!` | The ID of the business segment period. |
| `segment` | `SegmentType!` | The segment associated with this period. |

## Type `BusinessType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `id` | `ID!` | The business ID. |
| `name` | `String!` | The business' name. |
| `number` | `String!` | The business' number. |
| `displayableNumber` | `String` | Kraken-generated, human-readable number for display purposes. |
| `businessType` | `BusinessTypeOptions` | The company type of a business account. |
| `sectors` | `[BusinessSectorString!]!` | The sectors the business operates in. |
| `details` | `[BusinessDetailType]` | The details of the business. |
| `billingAddress` | `RichAddressType` | The billing address of the business. |
| `legalAddress` | `RichAddressType` | The legal address of the business. |
| `linkedAccountNumber` | `ID!` | Account number linked to this business. The possible errors that can be raised are: - KT-CT-11102: Business without related account. - KT-CT-1113: Disabled GraphQL field requested. Deprecated: The 'linkedAccountNumber' field is deprecated. Please use 'linkedAccountNumbers' instead, businesses can be related to multiple Accounts now. - Marked as deprecated on 2025-02-05. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-08-01. |
| `linkedAccountNumbers` | `[ID]!` | Account numbers linked to this business. |
| `segmentName` | `String` | The segment this business is assigned to. |
| `paymentMethods(validAt: DateTime, statuses: [PaymentInstructionStatus], before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `PaymentInstructionConnectionTypeConnection` | List payment instructions owned by this business. |
| `kanjiCompanyName` | `String` | Company name in Kanji. |
| `kanaCompanyName` | `String` | Company name in Kana. |

### Field arguments

#### `paymentMethods`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `validAt` | `DateTime` | Optionally return only payment instructions valid at the given datetime. |
| `statuses` | `[PaymentInstructionStatus]` | Optionally filter the payment instructions by status. |
| `before` | `String` |  |
| `after` | `String` |  |
| `first` | `Int` |  |
| `last` | `Int` |  |

## Type `CallTranscriptDownloadType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `url` | `String!` | Presigned S3 URL for the transcript file. Valid for one hour from the time the response is generated. |
| `type` | `CallTranscriptionType!` | Whether `url` points to the REDACTED or UNREDACTED transcript file. REDACTED is preferred and returned whenever a redacted file exists. UNREDACTED is only returned to callers that hold an additional permission for unredacted access. |
| `expiresAt` | `DateTime!` | The time at which the presigned `url` stops working. |

## Type `CallTranscriptType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `id` | `ID!` | The ID of the transcription record. |
| `call` | `CallInterface` | The call this transcription is for. May be null when the underlying recording is a participant-level recording whose participant is not associated with a call. |
| `status` | `CallTranscriptionStatus!` | The processing status of this transcription. A non-COMPLETED status means no `download` is available. |
| `vendor` | `String!` | The transcription vendor that produced this record. |
| `transcribedAt` | `DateTime` | The time the vendor reported the transcription complete. Null until the transcription reaches COMPLETED status. |
| `createdAt` | `DateTime!` | The time at which this transcription record was created. |
| `download` | `CallTranscriptDownloadType` | A presigned download for the transcript file, or null when the transcription is not COMPLETED, no eligible file exists, or the caller lacks permission for the only available file. |

## Type `CanModifyPaymentsType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `canAmendPayments` | `Boolean` | Whether or not the account can amend payments. |
| `canCancelPayments` | `Boolean` | Whether or not the account can cancel payments. |

## Type `CancelAmperageChangeRequest`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Cancel an amperage change request.

This mutation is used for cancelling amperage change requests by organizations.

The possible errors that can be raised are:

- KT-CT-4501: Unauthorized.
- KT-JP-4501: Unauthorized.
- KT-JP-4502: Unauthorized.
- KT-JP-4511: Invalid data.
- KT-JP-4520: Unable to process request.
- KT-JP-4515: Amperage change process not found.
- KT-JP-4516: Unable to cancel amperage change process.
- KT-CT-1113: Disabled GraphQL field requested.
- KT-CT-1111: Unauthorized.
- KT-CT-1112: 'Authorization' header not provided.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `possibleErrors` | `[PossibleErrorType]` | Field with the possible errors of the query/mutation. Deprecated: The 'possibleErrors' field is deprecated. Please use the 'possibleErrors' query or the 'X-Kraken-Possible-Errors' header instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2025-01-31. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-03-01. |
| `message` | `String` | Success message. |

## Type `CancelMoveOut`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

The possible errors that can be raised are:

- KT-JP-4537: Move out cancel input data is invalid.

- KT-JP-4536: Move out active process not found.
- KT-JP-4535: Move out cancel cannot self-service.

- KT-JP-4520: Unable to process request.
- KT-JP-4538: Move out process not withdrawable.
- KT-CT-1113: Disabled GraphQL field requested.

Please use the 'possibleErrors' query or the 'X-Kraken-Possible-Errors' header instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2025-01-31. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-03-01. |
| `spin` | `String!` | Supply point identification number. |

## Type `CancelPayment`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

The possible errors that can be raised are:

- KT-CT-3924: Unauthorized.
- KT-CT-3954: Payment cancellation failed.
- KT-CT-3955: Payment cannot be cancelled.
- KT-CT-3956: Temporary error occurred.
- KT-CT-1113: Disabled GraphQL field requested.
- KT-CT-1111: Unauthorized.
- KT-CT-1112: 'Authorization' header not provided.

## Type `CancelRepaymentRequest`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

The possible errors that can be raised are:

- KT-CT-3930: The repayment or refund request does not exist.
- KT-CT-3931: This repayment or refund request cannot be cancelled.
- KT-CT-1113: Disabled GraphQL field requested.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|

| `repaymentRequest` | `CancelRepaymentRequestOutputType` | The cancelled repayment/refund request. |

## Type `Charge`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

A charge to the customer.

**Implements:** `TransactionType`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `id` | `ID` | Unique identifier for the transaction. |
| `postedDate` | `Date` | Date when the transaction was posted to the account. |
| `createdAt` | `DateTime` | The date time when the transaction is created. |
| `accountNumber` | `String` | Unique identifier of the account the transaction belongs to. |
| `amount` | `Int` | Gross amount including tax (when payable). Refer to the `amounts` field for a breakdown of this information. |
| `amounts` | `TransactionAmountType` | The net, tax and gross amounts for the transaction. Note: for payments and repayments, only the net amount is returned. |
| `balanceCarriedForward` | `Int` | The customer's resulting balance after this transaction has been applied, in the smallest unit of currency. |
| `isCredit` | `Boolean` | Deprecated. Deprecated: The 'isCredit' field is deprecated. This information is provided by the __typename introspection query. - Marked as deprecated on 2020-06-19. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2022-11-15. |
| `isAccountCharge` | `Boolean` | Deprecated. Deprecated: The 'isAccountCharge' field is deprecated. This information is provided by the __typename introspection query. - Marked as deprecated on 2020-06-19. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2022-11-15. |
| `isAccountPayment` | `Boolean` | Deprecated. Deprecated: The 'isAccountPayment' field is deprecated. This information is provided by the __typename introspection query. - Marked as deprecated on 2020-06-19. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2022-11-15. |
| `isHeld` | `Boolean` | Whether the statement this transaction is on has been held. A held statement is not sent to a customer automatically, but is instead marked for manual attention by operations staff. Returns False if a statement is not linked with the transaction. |
| `isIssued` | `Boolean` | Whether this transaction has been issued on any billing document.Note: Look for the most recently issued transaction instead of looking through all transactions as some accounts may have initial transactions that were not issued.This will return False if the transaction is not associated with any billing documents. |
| `title` | `String` | Human-readable title describing the transaction. |
| `billingDocumentIdentifier` | `ID` | The unique identifier for the most recent billing document linked with the transaction.Note: a transaction may be linked with multiple documents, but this field will only return the identifier for the most recent billing document. |
| `statementId` | `ID` | Returns None if a statement is not linked with the transaction. Deprecated: The 'statementId' field is deprecated. Use `billingDocumentIdentifier` instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2023-11-30. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2024-06-01. |
| `isReversed` | `Boolean!` |  |
| `hasStatement` | `Boolean` | Returns True if the transaction is linked with a statement. |
| `note` | `String` | Returns the note field value for the transaction, which contains additional info. |
| `reasonCode` | `String` | Returns the reason. |
| `consumption` | `Consumption` | If this charge is for consumption of a good or service, this field will contain details of how much was consumed. Omitted in cases where the charge is not for consumption, or where consumption information is not available (e.g. for some older records). |
| `detail` | `ChargeDetail` | Supporting information about this charge (if any is available). |
| `lineItems(before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `LineItemConnectionTypeConnection` | The line items that make up the charge. |
| `readingId` | `String` | The reading ID associated with the charge. |

### Field arguments

#### `lineItems`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `before` | `String` |  |
| `after` | `String` |  |
| `first` | `Int` |  |
| `last` | `Int` |  |

## Type `ChargesBreakdownConnectionTypeConnection`

This field is a connection type. Connections are used to implement [cursor based pagination](https://graphql.org/learn/pagination/#pagination-and-edges).

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `pageInfo` | `PageInfo!` | Pagination data for this connection. |
| `edges` | `[ChargesBreakdownConnectionTypeEdge]!` | Contains the nodes in this connection. |
| `totalCount` | `Int!` | Total number of nodes. |
| `edgeCount` | `Int!` | Number of nodes in the edge. |

## Type `CloseDCAProceeding`

- KT-CT-11603: Could not stop debt collection proceeding.
- KT-CT-11604: Active debt collection proceeding does not exist for account.
- KT-CT-11605: Multiple active Proceeding's found for same agency and campaign on account.

- KT-CT-1111: Unauthorized.

Please use the 'possibleErrors' query or the 'X-Kraken-Possible-Errors' header instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2025-01-31. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-03-01. |
| `dcaProceedingClosureStatus` | `DCAProceedingClosureStatus` | Whether the closure could be applied. |

| `isActive` | `Boolean` | Whether the agreement is currently active. |
| `characteristicValues(at: DateTime)` | `[CharacteristicValueInterface]` | The characteristic values associated with the agreement. |
| `agreedFrom` | `DateTime` | The datetime the agreement was entered. |
| `agreedTo` | `DateTime` | The datetime the agreement was terminated. |
| `isRevoked` | `Boolean` | Whether the agreement is revoked. |
| `params` | `JSONString` | General parameters providing additional information about the agreement. |
| `gasCustomerNumber` | `String` | ガスお客様番号 (Gas customer number). |
| `gasSupplyPointId` | `String` | ガス供給地点特定番号 (Gas supply point identification number). |
| `address` | `String` | 住所 (Address). |

### Field arguments

#### `characteristicValues`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `at` | `DateTime` | The datetime to check the characteristic value at. |

- KT-CT-1112: 'Authorization' header not provided.

## Type `ComponentListType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

A list of components which comprise a screen.

This is a legacy type; GenericBackendScreen should be preferred. This is because API clients
should not need to explicitly query for screen attributes like `items` - these fields are
embedded in the screenData field.

**Implements:** `AccessibilityInterface`, `IdentifiableInterface`, `BackendScreenInterface`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `accessibilityHidden` | `Boolean` | Whether the element is hidden from view. |
| `accessibilityLabel` | `String` | Accessible description of the element. |
| `id` | `ID` | Unique identifier of the object. |
| `typename` | `String` | The name of the object's type. |
| `name` | `String!` | The name of the screen. |
| `refreshFrequency` | `Int` | The refresh / polling frequency in milliseconds. |
| `screenData` | `String` | Serialized JSON representation of the screen. |
| `items` | `[ItemType]!` | The list of components. Deprecated: The 'items' field is deprecated. Access `items` via `screenData` instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2024-07-02. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2024-08-01. |

## Type `ConfirmDoubleOptIn`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Confirm a requested consent.

This mutation will update the value of the consent associated with the provided token to ACCEPTED.

The possible errors that can be raised are:

- KT-CT-9016: Consent management not enabled.
- KT-CT-9020: Invalid consent expiring token.
- KT-CT-9021: Consent expiring token not found.
- KT-CT-9022: Consent for given token already accepted.
- KT-CT-1113: Disabled GraphQL field requested.
- KT-CT-1111: Unauthorized.
- KT-CT-1112: 'Authorization' header not provided.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `possibleErrors` | `[PossibleErrorType]` | Field with the possible errors of the query/mutation. Deprecated: The 'possibleErrors' field is deprecated. Please use the 'possibleErrors' query or the 'X-Kraken-Possible-Errors' header instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2025-01-31. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-03-01. |
| `consent` | `ConsentType` | The consent that was created or updated. |

## Type `Contract`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

A legally binding relationship agreed with a subject (e.g. an account).

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `identifier` | `NonEmptyString` | Unique identifier for the contract. |
| `title` | `String` | Title of the contract. |
| `party` | `ContractParty` | The party (Account or Business) that entered into this contract. |
| `subject` | `[Account]` | The accounts impacted by this contract. |
| `status` | `ContractStatus` | The status of the contract. |
| `validFrom` | `DateTime` | Date from which the contract is valid. |
| `validTo` | `DateTime` | Date until which the contract is valid, null if the contract is rolling. |
| `signedAt` | `DateTime` | Date when the contract was signed. |
| `cancelledAt` | `DateTime` | Date when the contract was cancelled, null if not cancelled. |
| `rescindedAt` | `DateTime` | Date when the contract was rescinded, null if not rescinded. |
| `lifecycle` | `ContractVersion` | The current version information for this contract. |
| `notes` | `[ContractNoteType]` | Notes associated with this contract. |
| `terms` | `[TermInterface]` | The terms of the contract. |

## Type `ContractCapacityType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `value` | `Decimal` | The value of the contract capacity. |
| `unit` | `ContractCapacityUnits` | The unit of the contract capacity. |

## Type `ContractCreationContext`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Represents a version of a contract with its effective date.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `requestedValidityPeriod` | `ValidityPeriod` | The requested validity period for the associated contract. |
| `confirmedValidityPeriod` | `ValidityPeriod` | The confirmed validity period for the associated contract. |

## Type `ContractCreationJourneyType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Represents a Contract Creation Journey.

**Implements:** `ContractJourneyInterface`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `number` | `NonEmptyString!` | The number of the contract journey. |
| `status` | `ContractJourneyStatus` | The status of the contract journey. |
| `contractDetails` | `ContractDetails` | The details of the associated contract. |
| `journeyType` | `ContractJourneyType` | The type of the contract journey. |
| `requestedAt` | `DateTime` | The date and time when the contract journey was requested. |
| `orderReference` | `String` | The order reference associated with the contract journey. |
| `notes` | `[ContractNoteType]` | Notes associated with this contract journey. |
| `context` | `ContractCreationContext` | The context data for the contract creation journey. |

## Type `ContractDetails`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Details of a contract excluding terms.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `identifier` | `NonEmptyString` | Unique identifier for the contract. |
| `title` | `String` | Title of the contract. |
| `party` | `ContractParty` | The party (Account or Business) that entered into this contract. |
| `subject` | `[Account]` | The accounts impacted by this contract. |
| `status` | `ContractStatus` | The status of the contract. |
| `validFrom` | `DateTime` | Date from which the contract is valid. |
| `validTo` | `DateTime` | Date until which the contract is valid, null if the contract is rolling. |
| `signedAt` | `DateTime` | Date when the contract was signed. |
| `cancelledAt` | `DateTime` | Date when the contract was cancelled, null if not cancelled. |
| `rescindedAt` | `DateTime` | Date when the contract was rescinded, null if not rescinded. |
| `lifecycle` | `ContractVersion` | The current version information for this contract. |
| `notes` | `[ContractNoteType]` | Notes associated with this contract. |

## Type `ContractMetaDataType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Represents additional metadata for a contract term.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `type` | `NonEmptyString` | The type of the term. |
| `displayName` | `NonEmptyString` | The display name of the term. |
| `description` | `NonEmptyString` | The description of the term. |
| `identifier` | `NonEmptyString` | The identifier of the term. |
| `isVariable` | `Boolean` | Whether the term is variable. |
| `metadata` | `JSONString` | The additional metadata of the contract. |

A reason that can be associated with a contract note.

|---|---:|---|

## Type `ContractNoteType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

A note associated with a contract or contract journey.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `reason` | `ContractNoteReasonType` | The reason associated with this note. |
| `note` | `String` | The content of the note. |
| `activityType` | `ContractActivityTypeOptions` | The contract activity type this note is associated with. |
| `createdAt` | `DateTime` | When the note was created. |

## Type `ContractVersion`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Represents a version of a contract with its effective date.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `versionReference` | `Int` | The reference number for this contract version. |
| `effectiveFrom` | `DateTime` | The date from which this version of the contract becomes effective. |

## Type `ContractedVolumeConfigurationType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

**Implements:** `TermInterface`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `type` | `NonEmptyString` | The type of the term. |
| `displayName` | `NonEmptyString` | The display name of the term. |
| `description` | `NonEmptyString` | The description of the term. |
| `identifier` | `NonEmptyString` | The identifier of the term. |
| `isVariable` | `Boolean` | Whether the term is variable. |
| `periods` | `[ContractedVolumePeriodType]` | The periods for the contracted volume configuration. |

## Type `ContractedVolumePeriodType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `value` | `Decimal` | The decimal value of the quantity provided by the contracted volume. |
| `unit` | `String` | The unit for the commodity provided by the contracted volume. |
| `marketName` | `String` | The market name the contracted volume applies to. |
| `validFrom` | `DateTime` | The datetime the period the contracted volume is valid from. |
| `validTo` | `DateTime` | The datetime the period the contracted volume is valid to. |

## Type `ContributionAgreementType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

A single Contribution Agreement.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `id` | `ID!` |  |
| `contributionScheme` | `ContributionSchemeType` | The scheme to which the agreement contributes. |
| `interval` | `Interval` | The frequency of contributions. |
| `activeFrom` | `DateTime` | The start datetime of the agreement. |
| `activeTo` | `DateTime` | The end datetime of the agreement, if any. |
| `amount` | `Int` | The amount contributed per interval. Note, this is in the smallest domination that the currecy support. e.g. Pence, Cents, Yen, etc. |
| `periods(before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `ContributionPeriodConnection` | The periods over which contributions have been made. |

### Field arguments

#### `periods`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `before` | `String` |  |
| `after` | `String` |  |
| `first` | `Int` |  |
| `last` | `Int` |  |

## Type `ContributionPeriodConnection`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Pagination for contribution periods.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `pageInfo` | `PageInfo!` | Pagination data for this connection. |
| `edges` | `[ContributionPeriodEdge]!` | Contains the nodes in this connection. |
| `totalCount` | `Int!` | Total number of nodes. |
| `edgeCount` | `Int!` | Number of nodes in the edge. |

## Type `ContributionPeriodEdge`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

A Relay edge containing a `ContributionPeriod` and its cursor.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `node` | `ContributionPeriodType` | The item at the end of the edge |
| `cursor` | `String!` | A cursor for use in pagination |

## Type `ContributionPeriodType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

A single Contribution Period.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `id` | `ID!` |  |
| `agreement` | `ContributionAgreementType!` |  |
| `fulfilledAt` | `DateTime` | When the contribution was fulfilled |
| `periodFrom` | `DateTime` | The datetime the marks the beginning of the period. |
| `periodTo` | `DateTime` | The datetime the marks the end of the period. |

## Type `ContributionSchemeType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

A single Contribution Scheme.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `id` | `ID!` |  |
| `code` | `String!` |  |
| `displayName` | `String!` |  |
| `taxable` | `Boolean!` | Are contributions to this scheme taxable? |
| `acceptingContributions` | `Boolean!` | Is this scheme currently accepting contributions? |

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `latitude` | `Float` |  |
| `longitude` | `Float` |  |

| Field | Returns | Description |

A Relay edge containing a `CoreSiteworksRequestConnectionType` and its cursor.

## Type `CoreSiteworksRequestType`

A Siteworks Request

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|

| `status` | `String!` |  |
| `reason` | `String!` |  |
| `createdAt` | `DateTime!` |  |
| `lastStatusUpdateAt` | `DateTime!` | When the request status was last updated. |
| `marketSupplyPoints(before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `SupplyPointConnectionTypeConnection` | List of supply points on request. |

#### `marketSupplyPoints`

| Argument | Type | Description |

| `after` | `String` |  |
| `first` | `Int` |  |
| `last` | `Int` |  |

## Type `CorrectivePeriodMarketConfigType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

GraphQL output type for a per-market CorrectivePeriod configuration.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `marketName` | `String` | The market this corrective period configuration applies to. |
| `supplyPointIds` | `[BigInt]` | Supply point IDs this config applies to. NULL means all supply points in this market. |
| `length` | `Int` | The length of the corrective period window. |
| `lengthUnit` | `String` | The unit of time for the corrective period length. |

## Type `CorrectivePeriodType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

GraphQL output type for the CorrectivePeriod term.

**Implements:** `TermInterface`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `type` | `NonEmptyString` | The type of the term. |
| `displayName` | `NonEmptyString` | The display name of the term. |
| `description` | `NonEmptyString` | The description of the term. |
| `identifier` | `NonEmptyString` | The identifier of the term. |
| `isVariable` | `Boolean` | Whether the term is variable. |
| `marketConfigs` | `[CorrectivePeriodMarketConfigType]` | Per-market corrective period configurations. |

## Type `CosGainProcess`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `requestId` | `String` | The ID of the switch-in request. |
| `customerName` | `String` | The name of the customer. |
| `customerNameKana` | `String` | The name of the customer, in kana. |
| `forecastedSupplyStartDate` | `Date` | The forecasted supply start date provided by OCCTO. Subject to change. |
| `availableActions` | `[SelfServiceAction]` | Available self-service actions. |

## Type `CosLossProcess`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `requestedSupplyEndDate` | `Date` | The requested supply end date provided by the customer. |
| `status` | `CosLossProcessStatus` | The status of the switch-out request. |

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|

| `krakenflexDeviceId` | `String` |  |

## Type `CreateAPICall`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

The possible errors that can be raised are:

- KT-CT-7803: Received an invalid apiExceptionId.
- KT-CT-1113: Disabled GraphQL field requested.
- KT-CT-1111: Unauthorized.
- KT-CT-1112: 'Authorization' header not provided.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `possibleErrors` | `[PossibleErrorType]` | Field with the possible errors of the query/mutation. Deprecated: The 'possibleErrors' field is deprecated. Please use the 'possibleErrors' query or the 'X-Kraken-Possible-Errors' header instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2025-01-31. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-03-01. |
| `apiCall` | `APICallType` | The created APICall. |

## Type `CreateCollectionProcessEvent`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Create a collection process event.

This mutation allows creating event records for collection processes to track
significant events like reactivations and errors.

The possible errors that can be raised are:

- KT-CT-1111: Unauthorized.
- KT-CT-11201: No Collection Process Records associated with id.
- KT-CT-1605: Invalid input.
- KT-CT-1113: Disabled GraphQL field requested.
- KT-CT-1112: 'Authorization' header not provided.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `possibleErrors` | `[PossibleErrorType]` | Field with the possible errors of the query/mutation. Deprecated: The 'possibleErrors' field is deprecated. Please use the 'possibleErrors' query or the 'X-Kraken-Possible-Errors' header instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2025-01-31. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-03-01. |
| `collectionProcessEvent` | `CollectionProcessEventOutputType` | The created collection process event. |

## Type `CreateContributionAgreement`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

The possible errors that can be raised are:

## Type `CreateExternalMessage`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Create an external message to record communications sent by external vendors.

This allows you to import messages, such as emails, sent using other tools into Kraken.

The possible errors that can be raised are:

- KT-CT-14201: Vendor is empty.
- KT-CT-14202: Vendor message ID is empty.
- KT-CT-14203: Account number is empty.
- KT-CT-14204: Message already exists.
- KT-CT-14205: Unable to create the external message.
- KT-CT-14206: An email body is missing.
- KT-CT-14207: To email is empty.
- KT-CT-14208: To email is not a valid email address.
- KT-CT-14209: From email is empty.
- KT-CT-14210: From email is an invalid format.
- KT-CT-14211: A reply to email address is empty.
- KT-CT-14212: A reply to email address is not a valid email address.
- KT-CT-14214: An account number was provided, but no corresponding account could be found.
- KT-CT-14215: Sent at datetime is in the future.
- KT-CT-14216: Sent at datetime is missing timezone.
- KT-CT-14219: Exactly one of emailContent or smsContent must be provided.
- KT-CT-14220: SMS body is empty.
- KT-CT-14221: To phone number is empty.
- KT-CT-14222: From phone number is empty.
- KT-CT-1113: Disabled GraphQL field requested.
- KT-CT-1111: Unauthorized.
- KT-CT-1112: 'Authorization' header not provided.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `possibleErrors` | `[PossibleErrorType]` | Field with the possible errors of the query/mutation. Deprecated: The 'possibleErrors' field is deprecated. Please use the 'possibleErrors' query or the 'X-Kraken-Possible-Errors' header instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2025-01-31. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-03-01. |
| `externalMessage` | `ExternalMessageType` | The external message that was created. |

## Type `CreatePaymentMethod`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Creates a new customer in GMO, a PaymentInstruction, and PaymentSchedule for an existing user.

This is called when creating a new CREDIT CARD payment method. Direct debit uses the
IncomingGMOCreationExistingAccountCallback webhook.

This endpoint is designed to be used on an account with no existing payment method.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `reference` | `String!` | GMO payment instruction reference. |

## Type `CreateReferral`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Use a referral code to create a referral and trigger a referral reward.
This is for customers to refer other customers so it only works with friend referrals and not
partner referrals. This will try to find a user with given referral code as their personal
referral code. If found, it will create an AccountReferral instance for the given
account number.

The possible errors that can be raised are:

- KT-CT-6723: Unauthorized.
- KT-CT-6710: Unable to create referral.
- KT-CT-6711: Accounts may not self-refer.
- KT-CT-6713: Referring and referred account brands do not match.
- KT-CT-6712: Invalid reference.
- KT-CT-1113: Disabled GraphQL field requested.
- KT-CT-1111: Unauthorized.
- KT-CT-1112: 'Authorization' header not provided.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `possibleErrors` | `[PossibleErrorType]` | Field with the possible errors of the query/mutation. Deprecated: The 'possibleErrors' field is deprecated. Please use the 'possibleErrors' query or the 'X-Kraken-Possible-Errors' header instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2025-01-31. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-03-01. |
| `referredAccountRewardAmount` | `Int` | The reward amount to be issued to the referred account, in smallest currency subunits. |

Create a shell account (a billable account with no property/energy supply).

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `portfolioNumber` | `String` |  |
| `givenName` | `String!` |  |
| `familyName` | `String!` |  |
| `billingName` | `String` |  |
| `email` | `String!` |  |
| `mobile` | `String` |  |
| `landline` | `String` |  |
| `brand` | `String` |  |
| `dateOfBirth` | `Date` |  |

| `billingAddressLine2` | `String` |  |
| `billingAddressLine3` | `String` |  |
| `billingAddressLine4` | `String` |  |
| `billingAddressLine5` | `String` |  |
| `billingPostcode` | `String` |  |
| `billingRichAddress` | `String` | This must be a string-ified version of the JSON representation of RichAddressInput type. |
| `billingPeriodLength` | `String` | For fixed billing accounts only, the length of their billing period. Can be MONTHLY or QUARTERLY. |
| `billingPeriodMultiplier` | `Int` | For fixed billing accounts only, the number the period length is to be multiplied by to get the total period length, i.e. for billing every second month, select 2 combined with a billing period length MONTHLY. Can't be > 1 for quarterly billing. |
| `billingPeriodDay` | `Int` | Day to fixed bill on if billing_period_length set. |
| `billingPeriodMonth` | `Int` | Month to start billing from if billing_period_length set to QUARTERLY or the multiplier is > 1. |
| `isBusinessAccount` | `Boolean` |  |
| `companyName` | `String` |  |
| `companyNumber` | `String` |  |
| `businessType` | `String` |  |
| `password` | `String` |  |
| `passwordUpdateToken` | `String` |  |
| `urn` | `String` |  |
| `errors` | `[ErrorType]` |  |
| `account` | `AccountInterface` |  |
| `clientMutationId` | `String` |  |

## Type `Credit`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

A credit to the customer from the energy retailer.

**Implements:** `TransactionType`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `id` | `ID` | Unique identifier for the transaction. |
| `postedDate` | `Date` | Date when the transaction was posted to the account. |
| `createdAt` | `DateTime` | The date time when the transaction is created. |
| `accountNumber` | `String` | Unique identifier of the account the transaction belongs to. |
| `amount` | `Int` | Gross amount including tax (when payable). Refer to the `amounts` field for a breakdown of this information. |
| `amounts` | `TransactionAmountType` | The net, tax and gross amounts for the transaction. Note: for payments and repayments, only the net amount is returned. |
| `balanceCarriedForward` | `Int` | The customer's resulting balance after this transaction has been applied, in the smallest unit of currency. |
| `isCredit` | `Boolean` | Deprecated. Deprecated: The 'isCredit' field is deprecated. This information is provided by the __typename introspection query. - Marked as deprecated on 2020-06-19. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2022-11-15. |
| `isAccountCharge` | `Boolean` | Deprecated. Deprecated: The 'isAccountCharge' field is deprecated. This information is provided by the __typename introspection query. - Marked as deprecated on 2020-06-19. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2022-11-15. |
| `isAccountPayment` | `Boolean` | Deprecated. Deprecated: The 'isAccountPayment' field is deprecated. This information is provided by the __typename introspection query. - Marked as deprecated on 2020-06-19. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2022-11-15. |
| `isHeld` | `Boolean` | Whether the statement this transaction is on has been held. A held statement is not sent to a customer automatically, but is instead marked for manual attention by operations staff. Returns False if a statement is not linked with the transaction. |
| `isIssued` | `Boolean` | Whether this transaction has been issued on any billing document.Note: Look for the most recently issued transaction instead of looking through all transactions as some accounts may have initial transactions that were not issued.This will return False if the transaction is not associated with any billing documents. |
| `title` | `String` | Human-readable title describing the transaction. |
| `billingDocumentIdentifier` | `ID` | The unique identifier for the most recent billing document linked with the transaction.Note: a transaction may be linked with multiple documents, but this field will only return the identifier for the most recent billing document. |
| `statementId` | `ID` | Returns None if a statement is not linked with the transaction. Deprecated: The 'statementId' field is deprecated. Use `billingDocumentIdentifier` instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2023-11-30. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2024-06-01. |
| `isReversed` | `Boolean!` |  |
| `hasStatement` | `Boolean` | Returns True if the transaction is linked with a statement. |
| `note` | `String` | Returns the note field value for the transaction, which contains additional info. |
| `reasonCode` | `String` | Returns the reason. |

## Type `DeauthenticateDevice`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

De-authenticate a registered device.

The possible errors that can be raised are:

- KT-CT-4301: Unable to find device for given account.
- KT-CT-4350: Unable to de-authenticate device.
- KT-CT-4352: This device cannot currently be de-authenticated.
- KT-CT-1113: Disabled GraphQL field requested.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `possibleErrors` | `[PossibleErrorType]` | Field with the possible errors of the query/mutation. Deprecated: The 'possibleErrors' field is deprecated. Please use the 'possibleErrors' query or the 'X-Kraken-Possible-Errors' header instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2025-01-31. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-03-01. |
| `krakenflexDevice` | `DeviceDetailsType` |  |

## Type `DeductLoyaltyPoints`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Deduct a set amount of loyalty points from an account.

The possible errors that can be raised are:

- KT-CT-1111: Unauthorized.
- KT-CT-5420: Unauthorized.
- KT-CT-9211: Invalid reason for loyalty points award.
- KT-CT-9219: Loyalty points user not found.
- KT-CT-9204: Negative or zero points set.
- KT-CT-9205: Insufficient Loyalty Points.
- KT-CT-9208: Invalid posted at datetime.
- KT-CT-9221: Idempotency key already used on ledger entry.
- KT-CT-1113: Disabled GraphQL field requested.
- KT-CT-1112: 'Authorization' header not provided.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `possibleErrors` | `[PossibleErrorType]` | Field with the possible errors of the query/mutation. Deprecated: The 'possibleErrors' field is deprecated. Please use the 'possibleErrors' query or the 'X-Kraken-Possible-Errors' header instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2025-01-31. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-03-01. |
| `pointsDeducted` | `Int` | The number of loyalty points that were deducted. |
| `ledgerEntry` | `LoyaltyPointLedgerEntryType` | The ledger entry for the deducted loyalty points. |

## Type `DelayerDaysType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Represents delayer days for active payment in a contract.

Note: This type is a stub, and will be fleshed out in the future.

**Implements:** `TermInterface`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `type` | `NonEmptyString` | The type of the term. |
| `displayName` | `NonEmptyString` | The display name of the term. |
| `description` | `NonEmptyString` | The description of the term. |
| `identifier` | `NonEmptyString` | The identifier of the term. |
| `isVariable` | `Boolean` | Whether the term is variable. |
| `days` | `Int!` | Number of days to delay based on delay strategy. |
| `strategy` | `DelayerDaysStrategy!` | Defines the method for calculating the delay period. |

## Type `DeletePropertyDescendants`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Delete all descendants of a property in a hierarchy.

This permanently deletes all descendant nodes (children, grandchildren, etc.)
but keeps the property node itself in the hierarchy. This operation is
idempotent - if the property is not in the hierarchy or has no descendants,
it will succeed without error.

The possible errors that can be raised are:

- KT-CT-6622: Unauthorized.
- KT-CT-1113: Disabled GraphQL field requested.
- KT-CT-1111: Unauthorized.
- KT-CT-1112: 'Authorization' header not provided.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `possibleErrors` | `[PossibleErrorType]` | Field with the possible errors of the query/mutation. Deprecated: The 'possibleErrors' field is deprecated. Please use the 'possibleErrors' query or the 'X-Kraken-Possible-Errors' header instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2025-01-31. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-03-01. |
| `property` | `PropertyType` | The property whose descendants were deleted. |

**Kind:** `OBJECT`
