## Type `DemandResponseCampaignParticipantType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Type representing the fields in the model representing a customer's results for the latest
demand response campaign.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `totalDiffKwh` | `Float` | The total in kWh that a customer's consumption changed by participating in the latest campaign. |
| `successfulDaysCount` | `Int` | The number of demand response event days where a customer achieved the target. |
| `campaignName` | `String` | The campaign that the participant belongs to. |
| `campaignStart` | `DateTime` | The start date of this campaign. |
| `campaignEnd` | `DateTime` | The end date of this campaign. |
| `averagePercentageDifference` | `Float` | The average percentage difference across all demand response days. |
| `demandResponseDailyResults` | `[DemandResponseDailyResultType!]!` | Fetch a list of each demand response date the customer participated in. |
| `totalDiffCarbon` | `Float` | The total CO2 that a customer saved or increased due to their consumption change. |
| `totalTreesSaved` | `Float` | The total CO2 that a customer saved converted into trees. |
| `optedInAt` | `DateTime` | The timestamp when the account opted in for this campaign. |
| `tips` | `JSONString` | Get the campaign tips and whether they've been completed by the participant. |
| `numberOfEntries` | `Int` | Get the number of entries the participant has for the next prize draw. |
| `isEligibleForEvents` | `Boolean` | A participant is eligible for events if they have been more than a few days on supply. |
| `isOptedIntoEvents` | `Boolean` | Whether the participant is opted in to future events. |
| `isOptedIntoEmails` | `Boolean` | Whether the participant is opted in to `email` communications. |
| `isOptedIntoLine` | `Boolean` | Whether the participant is opted in to `line` communications. |
| `spin` | `String` | Signed up supply point identification number. |

## Type `DemandResponseDailyResultType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Type representing a single day's results for a customer attempting
a demand response event.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `eventDate` | `Date` | The date of a particular demand response event. |
| `validFrom` | `DateTime` | The start time of a particular demand response event. |
| `validTo` | `DateTime` | The end time of a particular demand response event. |
| `baselineConsumptionKwh` | `Float` | The expected consumption of a customer with responding to a demand response event. |
| `outturnConsumptionKwh` | `Float` | The actual consumption of a customer, having responded to an event. |
| `percentageDifference` | `Float` | The percentage difference between the target and actual consumption. |
| `amountSaved` | `Float` | The amount in yen that have been saved in this challenge. |
| `numberOfEntries` | `Int` | Get the number of entries the participant has got from this daily result. |

## Type `DepositAgreementOutput`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `depositKey` | `String` | The deposit agreement key (unique). |
| `depositAmount` | `Int` | The deposit agreement amount. |
| `acceptedAt` | `DateTime` | The timestamp at which the customer accepted the deposit agreement. |
| `fulfilledAt` | `DateTime` | The timestamp at which the deposit agreement was fulfilled. |
| `collectionDate` | `Date` | The date on which a payment is requested for deposit collection (defaults to current date, if not specified in the deposit policy). |
| `dueDate` | `Date` | The date by which the deposit agreement must be fulfilled (defaults to 31-12-9999 i.e. deposit is never late, if not specified in the deposit policy). |
| `returnStrategy` | `String` | The return strategy used to return the deposit. |
| `currentEligibilityStatus` | `CurrentEligibilityStatusOutput` | The current eligibility status for a deposit return. |

| `amount` | `Int` | The amount to be returned in this installment. |
| `status` | `String` | The status of this return installment. |

## Type `Device`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

**Implements:** `HasReadings`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `readings(startAt: DateTime!, endAt: DateTime!, readingType: ReadingTypes!, timeGranularity: TimeGranularities, timezone: String, units: [Units])` | `Readings` | Get readings from a readable device e.g., a supply point, device, or register. |
| `deviceIdentifier` | `String` | The id of the device. This field can only be provided in the output if device level readings are also requested. |
| `registers(registerIdentifiers: [String], before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `RegistersConnection` | The registers associated with this device. |

### Field arguments

#### `readings`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `startAt` | `DateTime!` | The inclusive start of the time period as an isoformatted string. |
| `endAt` | `DateTime!` | The exclusive end of the time period as an isoformatted string. |
| `readingType` | `ReadingTypes!` | Get readings of only this type. |
| `timeGranularity` | `TimeGranularities` | Time buckets to group readings into. |
| `timezone` | `String` | The timezone in which to return readings. Default: `"Asia/Tokyo"`. |
| `units` | `[Units]` | Optional filter to return readings only for specific list of units or unit (e.g., KILOWATT_HOURS, METERS_CUBED, LITER, etc.). |

#### `registers`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `registerIdentifiers` | `[String]` | The ids of the registers to get. If not provided, all registers for device will be returned. |
| `before` | `String` |  |
| `after` | `String` |  |
| `first` | `Int` |  |
| `last` | `Int` |  |

## Type `DeviceRegister`

**Implements:** `HasReadings`

| Field | Returns | Description |

| `registerIdentifier` | `String` | The id of the register. This field can only be provided in the output if register level readings are also requested. |

| `readingType` | `ReadingTypes!` | Get readings of only this type. |
| `timeGranularity` | `TimeGranularities` | Time buckets to group readings into. |

| `units` | `[Units]` | Optional filter to return readings only for specific list of units or unit (e.g., KILOWATT_HOURS, METERS_CUBED, LITER, etc.). |

## Type `DeviceRegistration`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Register a device for smart controlling.

- KT-CT-4324: Device already registered error.
- KT-CT-4321: Serializer validation error.
- KT-CT-4312: Unable to register device.
- KT-CT-4363: No capable devices found.
- KT-CT-4364: Multiple devices found.
- KT-CT-1113: Disabled GraphQL field requested.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `possibleErrors` | `[PossibleErrorType]` | Field with the possible errors of the query/mutation. Deprecated: The 'possibleErrors' field is deprecated. Please use the 'possibleErrors' query or the 'X-Kraken-Possible-Errors' header instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2025-01-31. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-03-01. |
| `registeredDeviceIds` | `[String]` | Device ID(s) of the registered device(s). |

| `supportedProviders` | `[String]` |  |
| `isIntegrationLive` | `Boolean` |  |

## Type `ElectricityGenerationPoint`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `id` | `ID` | Electricity generation point id. |
| `gpin` | `String!` | The generation point identification number. |
| `status` | `GenerationPointStatus!` | The generation point status. |
| `agreements` | `[GenerationAgreement]` | The Agreements linked to this electricity generation point. |
| `latestExportCosGainProcess` | `ExportCosGainProcess` | The most recent Export Cos Gain Process. |
| `intervalReadings(productCode: String)` | `[ExportIntervalReadings!]!` | Return the monthly confirmed Export readings associated with a given Electricity Generation Point.Restricted by the Agreement Periods. |
| `halfHourlyReadings(fromDatetime: DateTime, toDatetime: DateTime, productCode: String)` | `[ElectricityHalfHourReading!]!` | Fetch Half Hourly Readings for this GPIN from and to a given datetime of any version. Restricted by the Agreement Periods. |

### Field arguments

#### `intervalReadings`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `productCode` | `String` | Base cost estimations on this product. |

#### `halfHourlyReadings`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `fromDatetime` | `DateTime` | Search for Readings where the start of the period is greater than or equal to this datetime. |
| `toDatetime` | `DateTime` | Search for Readings where the start of the period is less than this datetime. |
| `productCode` | `String` | Base cost estimations on this product. |

## Type `ElectricityHalfHourReading`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Half Hourly Interval Reading - can be a variety of different versions.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `startAt` | `DateTime!` | Start of Interval Period. |
| `endAt` | `DateTime!` | End of Interval Period - always 30mins later. |
| `value` | `Decimal!` | Consumed amount of Electricity during period, in kWh. |
| `costEstimate` | `Decimal!` | Estimated cost for amount of Electricity used. |
| `version` | `HalfHourlyReadingsVersions!` | The version of the half hourly reading. |
| `consumptionRateBand` | `String!` | The tariff's consumption product rate band that this reading falls into. |
| `consumptionStep` | `Int!` | Placeholder for FED type check, will remove it soon. |

## Type `ElectricityIntervalReading`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Monthly Interval Reading - which may have associated 30min Readings

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `id` | `ID` |  |
| `readingDate` | `Date` | Date when the reading was taken. |
| `billableMonth` | `String!` | The month with which the monthly interval reading is associated. |
| `startAt` | `DateTime!` | Start of Interval Period. |
| `endAt` | `DateTime!` | End of Interval Period. |
| `periodLengthDays` | `Int!` | The interval period length, in days. |
| `value` | `Decimal!` | Consumed amount of Electricity during period, in kWh. |
| `hasHalfHourlyDataForPeriod` | `Boolean!` | Tracks whether there are Half Hourly Readings associated with this Interval. |
| `halfHourlyReadings` | `[ElectricityHalfHourReading!]!` | Fetch Half Hourly Readings associated with this interval reading. Will return an empty list if has_half_hourly_data_for_period is False. |
| `costEstimate` | `Decimal!` | Estimated cost for amount of Electricity used. |

## Type `ElectricitySupplyPoint`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `id` | `ID` |  |
| `spin` | `String!` | The supply point identification number. |
| `amperage` | `Int` | The supply point capacity in Amperes. Deprecated: The 'amperage' field is deprecated. This field may not contain the most up-to-date information. Please check the supply details list for the current value. - Marked as deprecated on 2024-12-20. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-12-20. |
| `kva` | `Int` | The supply point capacity in kVA. Deprecated: The 'kva' field is deprecated. This field may not contain the most up-to-date information. Please check the supply details list for the current value. - Marked as deprecated on 2024-12-20. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-12-20. |
| `kw` | `Decimal` | The supply point capacity in kW. Deprecated: The 'kw' field is deprecated. This field may not contain the most up-to-date information. Please check the supply details list for the current value. - Marked as deprecated on 2024-12-20. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-12-20. |
| `status` | `SupplyPointStatus!` | The meter point status. |
| `agreements(onlyActive: Boolean)` | `[Agreement]!` | The Agreements linked to this electricity supply point. |
| `supplyDetails` | `[SupplyDetails]` | Historical supply details list for this account, ordered by the valid_from date in descending order. |
| `activeCosGainProcess` | `CosGainProcess` | The latest active cos gain process for the account. |
| `latestCosGainProcess` | `CosGainProcess` | The latest cos gain process for the account. |
| `activeCosLossProcess` | `CosLossProcess` | The latest active cos loss process for the account. |
| `latestMoveInProcess` | `MoveInProcess` | The latest active move in process for the account. |
| `activeMoveOutProcess` | `MoveOutProcess` | The latest active move out process for the account. |
| `latestCosLossProcess` | `CosLossProcess` | The latest cos loss process for the account. |
| `latestMoveOutProcess` | `MoveOutProcess` | The latest move out process for the account. |
| `activeAmperageChangeProcess` | `AmperageChangeProcess` | The latest active amperage change process for the account. |
| `activeCustomerDetailsChangeProcess` | `CustomerDetailsChangeProcess` | The latest active customer details change process for the account. |
| `canApplyAmperageChange` | `Boolean` | An indication of whether a customer can apply for the change themselves. |
| `canUpdateMoveInDate` | `Boolean` | An indication of whether the move-in date can be updated. |
| `canUpdateMoveOutDate` | `Boolean` | An indication of whether the move-out date can be updated. |
| `newAmperageOptions` | `[Int]!` | A list of the possible amperage values to select. |
| `earliestAmperageChangeDate` | `Date!` | The earliest date in which an amperage change can be performed. |
| `intervalReadings(productCode: String, sortOrder: IntervalReadingsSortOrder, endAt: DateTime, startAt: DateTime)` | `[ElectricityIntervalReading!]!` | Return the monthly confirmed readings associated with a given Supply Point. Restricted by the Agreement Periods. |
| `halfHourlyReadings(fromDatetime: DateTime, toDatetime: DateTime, productCode: String)` | `[ElectricityHalfHourReading!]!` | Fetch Half Hourly Readings for this SPIN from and to a given datetime of any version. Restricted by the Agreement Periods. The possible errors that can be raised are: - KT-CT-1609: The provided datetime ISO string is not timezone aware, please provide timezone information. - KT-CT-1113: Disabled GraphQL field requested. |
| `nextReadingDate` | `Date` | Date of when the next reading will be collected by the grid operator. |
| `nextNextReadingDate` | `Date` | Date of when the reading after the next reading will be collected by the grid operator. |
| `readingDateDayOfMonth` | `Int` | The day of the month on which the reading is collected. |
| `supplyPeriods` | `[SupplyPeriodType]` | The supply periods for the supply point. |
| `references` | `[ElectricitySupplyPointReference]` | References for the electricity supply point. |
| `meters` | `[ElectricityMeter]` | The electricity meters associated with this supply point. |
| `contractedCapacity` | `ContractCapacityType` | The calculated capacity. |
| `contractedCapacityOld` | `String` | (Soon to be deprecated) The calculated capacity based on the agreement. |

### Field arguments

#### `agreements`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `onlyActive` | `Boolean` |  |

#### `intervalReadings`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `productCode` | `String` | Base cost estimations on this product. |
| `sortOrder` | `IntervalReadingsSortOrder` | Sort order of the readings. Default: `ASC`. |
| `endAt` | `DateTime` | Defaults to the far future which will return the most recent readings. Default: `"9999-12-29T23:59:59.999999+09:00"`. |
| `startAt` | `DateTime` | Defaults to the far future which will return the oldest readings. Default: `"0001-01-03T00:00:00+09:18:59"`. |

#### `halfHourlyReadings`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `fromDatetime` | `DateTime` | Search for Readings where the start of the period is greater than or equal to this timezone-aware datetime. |
| `toDatetime` | `DateTime` | Search for Readings where the start of the period is less than this timezone-aware datetime. |
| `productCode` | `String` | Base cost estimations on this product. |

Please use the 'possibleErrors' query or the 'X-Kraken-Possible-Errors' header instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2025-01-31. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-03-01. |

## Type `Energy`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Describes the energy (not power) consumed (e.g. as electricity) or returned (e.g. as heat) by a
system over a given span of time.

Differs from `Power` in that it describes the *total* amount of energy transferred during a
given time frame (not a single point in time).

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `value` | `Decimal` | The amount of energy (not power) transmitted. |
| `unit` | `EnergyUnit!` | The units in which the energy is being measured. |

## Type `EstimatedMoneyType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `estimatedAmount` | `Decimal!` | Monetary cost of the statistic. This is the smallest unit of currency, e.g. cents for USD or yen for JPY. Because electricity is priced as a commodity, we must account for fractional cents and this field must be a Decimal. Values from this field should likely not be used for accounting purposes. |
| `costCurrency` | `String!` | Monetary currency of the statistic in ISO-4217 format. |
| `pricePerUnit` | `PricePerUnit` | Net price per unit of the statistic if applicable. |

## Type `ExtendAgreementPeriod`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Extend the period of an agreement.

The possible errors that can be raised are:

- KT-CT-4178: No account found with given account number.
- KT-CT-1501: Agreement not found.
- KT-CT-1504: Account does not match with the agreement.
- KT-CT-1505: Unable to edit agreement.
- KT-CT-1506: Agreement period is not within the supply and property period.
- KT-CT-1514: Extension valid_to date must be later than the current valid_to date.
- KT-CT-1515: Agreement must have an end date to be extensible.
- KT-CT-1113: Disabled GraphQL field requested.
- KT-CT-1111: Unauthorized.
- KT-CT-1112: 'Authorization' header not provided.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `possibleErrors` | `[PossibleErrorType]` | Field with the possible errors of the query/mutation. Deprecated: The 'possibleErrors' field is deprecated. Please use the 'possibleErrors' query or the 'X-Kraken-Possible-Errors' header instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2025-01-31. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-03-01. |
| `agreement` | `CommonAgreementType` | Agreement that we are going to extend. |

## Type `ExternalIdAccountLink`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Represents a currently active link between an account user and an external vendor ID.

Only returns LINKED (active) linkages. Due to database constraints, each user can only
have one active linkage per vendor at a time.

All fields have query_complexity=1 as they are auto-resolved from the model instance
with no additional database queries or external API calls.

Ref: https://docs.kraken.guide/kraken-core/master/interfaces/apis/howto/graphql/query_complexity.html

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `vendor` | `String!` | The vendor identifier (e.g., 'RAKUTEN'). |
| `vendorUserId` | `String!` | The user's ID on the vendor's platform. |
| `status` | `String!` | The linkage status (will always be 'LINKED' for returned records). |

## Type `ExternalMessageEventType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

A status update for an external message, such as delivery confirmation, a bounce, or an open.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `id` | `ID!` | The ID of the message event. |
| `eventType` | `MessageEventType!` | The type of message event. |
| `occurredAt` | `DateTime!` | The date and time this event occurred. |

## Type `ExternalMessageType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

An external message, which is a record of a communication such as an email, sent by an external messaging vendor.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `id` | `ID!` | The ID in Kraken of the external message. |
| `vendor` | `String!` | The name of the external messaging vendor that sent this message. |
| `vendorMessageId` | `String!` | The unique ID of the message in the external vendor's system. |
| `sentAt` | `DateTime!` | The date and time this message was sent. |

## Type `ExternalSalesInfoType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

GraphQL type representing external sales information.

This type is used to represent sales records that originate from external systems
or processes outside of Kraken's direct tracking mechanisms.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `salesRecordIdentifier` | `String` | The unique identifier for the sales record. |

## Type `FetchElectricityGenerationPointDetails`

The possible errors that can be raised are:

- KT-JP-4606: GPIN does not exist on OCCTO.
- KT-JP-4603: OCCTO could not process the request.
- KT-JP-4607: An unexpected error occurred when trying to fetch GPIN details.
- KT-CT-1113: Disabled GraphQL field requested.
- KT-CT-1111: Unauthorized.
- KT-CT-1112: 'Authorization' header not provided.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `possibleErrors` | `[PossibleErrorType]` | Field with the possible errors of the query/mutation. Deprecated: The 'possibleErrors' field is deprecated. Please use the 'possibleErrors' query or the 'X-Kraken-Possible-Errors' header instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2025-01-31. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-03-01. |
| `quoteRequest` | `Quote` | The updated quote request. |
| `quotedSupplyPoint` | `QuotedElectricityGenerationPoint` | The quoted electricity generation point. |

## Type `FlexSupportedDevices`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

A list of supported makes and models for a given device type.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `deviceType` | `KrakenFlexDeviceTypes!` | The type of device, expressed via the legacy `KrakenFlexDeviceTypes` enum. For responses produced via `supportedDeviceType: CHARGE_POINTS`, this field is populated with `ELECTRIC_VEHICLES` for backward compatibility. Read `supportedDeviceType` for the actual value. |
| `supportedDeviceType` | `FlexSupportedDeviceTypes` | The type of device, including charge points. Null when the response was produced via the legacy `deviceType` argument. |
| `supportedMakes` | `[FlexSupportedMake]!` | List of supported brands or manufacturer. |

## Type `FlexSupportedMake`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

A brand or manufacturer of the device and its associated models.

If models is empty, all models for this make are supported.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `make` | `String!` | Brand or manufacturer of the device. |
| `models` | `[FlexSupportedModel]!` | List of supported models for the device make. If empty, all models are supported. |

## Type `FlexSupportedModel`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

A supported model for a given make.

If model year range is null, all years are supported.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `modelYearRange` | `ModelYearRange` | Model years supported. If null, all model years are supported. |
| `modelName` | `String!` | Model name of the device. |

## Type `FormScreenType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

A screen type for forms with input fields.

Combines display items with input fields (TextField, Checkbox, Toggle),
and provides primary/secondary buttons for form submission.

Note: header and footer are embedded in screenData and not exposed as
separate GraphQL fields, following the pattern of ComponentListType.

**Implements:** `AccessibilityInterface`, `IdentifiableInterface`, `BackendScreenInterface`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `accessibilityHidden` | `Boolean` | Whether the element is hidden from view. |
| `accessibilityLabel` | `String` | Accessible description of the element. |
| `id` | `ID` | Unique identifier of the object. |
| `typename` | `String` | The name of the object's type. |
| `name` | `String!` | The name of the screen. |
| `refreshFrequency` | `Int` | The refresh / polling frequency in milliseconds. |
| `screenData` | `String` | Serialized JSON representation of the screen. |

## Type `GasSupplyPoint`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `spin` | `String!` | The supply point identification number. |
| `physicalMeterNumber` | `String!` |  |
| `readingBatch` | `String!` |  |
| `readingDateType` | `String!` |  |
| `readingMethodType` | `String!` |  |
| `meterCapacity` | `String` | The meter capacity of the supply point. |
| `status` | `GasSupplyPointStatus!` | The meter point status. |
| `previousReadingDate` | `Date` | Date of when the previous reading was collected by the grid operator. |
| `nextReadingDate` | `Date` | Date of when the next reading will be collected by the grid operator. |
| `nextNextReadingDate` | `Date` | Date of when the reading after the next reading will be collected by the grid operator. |
| `supplyPeriods` | `[SupplyPeriodType]` | The supply periods for the supply point. |
| `activeDisconnectionProcess` | `DisconnectionProcess` | The latest active disconnection process for the supply point. |
| `intervalReadings(fromDatetime: DateTime, toDatetime: DateTime, sortOrder: IntervalReadingsSortOrder)` | `[GasIntervalReading]` | The meter readings for the supply point. |
| `agreements(onlyActive: Boolean)` | `[Agreement]!` | The Agreements linked to this gas supply point. |

### Field arguments

#### `intervalReadings`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `fromDatetime` | `DateTime` | Find readings that end after this datetime. |
| `toDatetime` | `DateTime` | Find readings that start before this datetime. |
| `sortOrder` | `IntervalReadingsSortOrder` | Chronological sort order of the readings. Default: `ASC`. |

#### `agreements`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `onlyActive` | `Boolean` | Whether only active agreements should be returned. |

## Type `GenerateInkPresignedUrl`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

The possible errors that can be raised are:

- KT-CT-7620: Channel not supported.
- KT-CT-7618: Unable to process message.
- KT-CT-7624: Error when generating the presigned URL.
- KT-CT-1113: Disabled GraphQL field requested.
- KT-CT-1111: Unauthorized.
- KT-CT-1112: 'Authorization' header not provided.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|

Please use the 'possibleErrors' query or the 'X-Kraken-Possible-Errors' header instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2025-01-31. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-03-01. |
| `uploadUrl` | `String!` | A presigned URL for the user to upload to the quarantine bucket. |
| `key` | `String!` | The key for the item. |
| `fields` | `JSONString!` | Presigned post fields required to upload the file. |

## Type `GeneratePreSignedToken`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Mutation to generate a pre-signed token.

The pre-signed, expiring and opaque tokens will be swapped
for a limited scope JWT (Kraken Token).

The possible errors that can be raised are:

- KT-CT-1128: Unauthorized.
- KT-CT-1120: The Kraken Token has expired.
- KT-CT-1131: Unauthorized.
- KT-CT-1113: Disabled GraphQL field requested.
- KT-CT-1111: Unauthorized.
- KT-CT-1112: 'Authorization' header not provided.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `possibleErrors` | `[PossibleErrorType]` | Field with the possible errors of the query/mutation. Deprecated: The 'possibleErrors' field is deprecated. Please use the 'possibleErrors' query or the 'X-Kraken-Possible-Errors' header instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2025-01-31. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-03-01. |
| `token` | `String` |  |
| `tokenExpiryDatetime` | `DateTime` |  |
| `scope` | `PreSignedTokenScope` |  |

## Type `GetEmbeddedSecretForNewPaymentInstruction`

Please use the 'possibleErrors' query or the 'X-Kraken-Possible-Errors' header instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2025-01-31. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-03-01. |
| `secretKey` | `String` |  |

## Type `GetEmbeddedSecretForNewPaymentInstructionWithoutAccount`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Get the client secret needed to create a new stored payment instruction using an embedded form.

| `secretKey` | `String` | The client secret needed to create a new stored payment instruction. |

## Type `GetOrCreateAgreement`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

The possible errors that can be raised are:

- KT-CT-4123: Unauthorized.
- KT-CT-4719: No supply point found for identifier provided.
- KT-CT-4910: No product exists with the given input.
- KT-CT-1503: Agreement valid_to date must be later than valid_from date.
- KT-CT-1509: Unable to create agreement.
- KT-CT-1511: Cannot create overlapping agreement.
- KT-CT-1512: Account type does not support agreements.

Please use the 'possibleErrors' query or the 'X-Kraken-Possible-Errors' header instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2025-01-31. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-03-01. |
| `created` | `Boolean` | Indicates whether a new agreement was created (true) or an existing agreement was returned (false). |
| `agreement` | `CommonAgreementType` | The agreement that was retrieved or created. |

## Type `InboundCallAverageWaitTimeForAttributesType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `yesterday` | `Int` | The average number of seconds passed before an inbound call with the given routing attributes is answered. This value represents the calls received on the previous day. The possible errors that can be raised are: - KT-CT-11821: No calls found matching the given routing attributes. - KT-CT-1113: Disabled GraphQL field requested. |
| `recent` | `Int` | The average number of seconds passed before an inbound call with the given routing attributes is answered. This value represents the calls received in the last 30 minutes. The possible errors that can be raised are: - KT-CT-11821: No calls found matching the given routing attributes. - KT-CT-1113: Disabled GraphQL field requested. |

## Type `InboundCallAverageWaitTimeType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `yesterday` | `Int` | The average number of seconds passed before an inbound call is answered. This value represents the calls received on the previous day. |
| `recent` | `Int` | The average number of seconds passed before an inbound call is answered. This value represents the calls received in the last 30 minutes. |

## Type `InboundCallType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

**Implements:** `CallInterface`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `id` | `ID!` | The ID of the call. |
| `account` | `Account` | If known, this is the account that a call is about. For inbound calls, we attempt to identify the account based on the phone number of the incoming call. For outbound calls, the account will be automatically set if the call was initiated from an account page. For all call types, the account can be updated, for example to correct a misidentification of an incoming call. |
| `metadata` | `[CallMetadataItemType]!` | Metadata related to the call, for example metrics or data passed via an interactive voice response (IVR). |
| `initialCallerIdentification` | `PhoneNumberIdentificationType!` | When an inbound call is received, we identify all entities linked to the phone number of the caller. |

## Type `InitiateHostedStandalonePayment`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Initiate a standalone payment and return the url where the customer can complete it.

The possible errors that can be raised are:

- KT-CT-1128: Unauthorized.
- KT-CT-3822: Unauthorized.
- KT-CT-3943: Invalid ledger.
- KT-CT-3957: No collection method provided.
- KT-CT-3958: Provide either ledger ID or ledger number.
- KT-CT-1113: Disabled GraphQL field requested.
- KT-CT-1111: Unauthorized.
- KT-CT-1112: 'Authorization' header not provided.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `possibleErrors` | `[PossibleErrorType]` | Field with the possible errors of the query/mutation. Deprecated: The 'possibleErrors' field is deprecated. Please use the 'possibleErrors' query or the 'X-Kraken-Possible-Errors' header instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2025-01-31. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-03-01. |
| `payment` | `InitiateHostedStandalonePaymentOutput` | The details required to refer to and complete a hosted payment. |

## Type `InitiateHostedStandalonePaymentOutput`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Tokens required to collect and retrieve a standalone payment.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `retrievalToken` | `String!` | The retrieval token for this standalone payment. |
| `url` | `String!` | The url for the customer to complete the payment. |

## Type `InitiateProductSwitch`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

The possible errors that can be raised are:

- KT-CT-1111: Unauthorized.
- KT-CT-4619: Quote with given code not found.
- KT-CT-4624: Unable to accept the given product code.
- KT-CT-4924: Unauthorized.
- KT-CT-4626: No product selected for the given quote code.
- KT-CT-4719: No supply point found for identifier provided.
- KT-CT-1509: Unable to create agreement.
- KT-CT-1507: Agreement product switch date is not within the acceptable range.
- KT-CT-4640: Unable to get market or client params from quoted product.
- KT-CT-4627: No products are available for this quote.
- KT-CT-1113: Disabled GraphQL field requested.
- KT-CT-1112: 'Authorization' header not provided.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `possibleErrors` | `[PossibleErrorType]` | Field with the possible errors of the query/mutation. Deprecated: The 'possibleErrors' field is deprecated. Please use the 'possibleErrors' query or the 'X-Kraken-Possible-Errors' header instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2025-01-31. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-03-01. |
| `productCode` | `String!` | The selected product for a specific product switch. |
| `switchDate` | `Date!` | The date at which the product switch becomes effective. |

## Type `InitiateSwitchIn`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Creates a domestic account and initiates a switch-in for that account.

The possible errors that can be raised are:

- KT-JP-3902: Payment instruction creation using the same card number on the same day is not allowed.
- KT-JP-3903: Unable to create payment customer.
- KT-JP-3904: Unable to change card with token.
- KT-JP-4103: Please set a password for the user before creating a new one using the same information.
- KT-JP-4104: Unable to create account for user.
- KT-JP-4105: Unable to reactivate account.
- KT-JP-4106: Unable to create account due to schedule conflict.
- KT-JP-4504: Please fill in correct SPIN which is registered in OCCTO.
- KT-CT-1113: Disabled GraphQL field requested.
- KT-CT-1111: Unauthorized.
- KT-CT-1112: 'Authorization' header not provided.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `possibleErrors` | `[PossibleErrorType]` | Field with the possible errors of the query/mutation. Deprecated: The 'possibleErrors' field is deprecated. Please use the 'possibleErrors' query or the 'X-Kraken-Possible-Errors' header instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2025-01-31. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-03-01. |
| `accountNumber` | `String!` | Account number for the resolved account. |
| `token` | `String` | Token for the resolved user. |
| `userId` | `String` | ID of the resolved user. |
| `hasUsablePassword` | `Boolean!` | Indicates if the user has a usable password and can log in immediately. |
| `hashedAccountApplicationId` | `String` | Hashed account application ID. |

## Type `InkMessageAttributes`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `accounts` | `[String!]!` | The list of accounts related to the message. |
| `accountType` | `String` | The type of the account linked to the conversation of the message. |

| `conversationId` | `Int!` | The ID of the conversation this message belongs to. |

| `isFirstFromContact` | `Boolean!` | Whether the message is the first one sent by the contact. |
| `isNewThread` | `Boolean!` | Whether the message starts a new thread in its conversation. |
| `opsTeam` | `String` | The operation team that handles the message. |
| `recentlyReceivedAutoReplies` | `[String!]!` | The codes of the auto replies that have been sent to the contact in the last 6 months. |
| `replyToCommsSms` | `String` | The body of the latest comms SMS message sent to the customer, if the message is an sms. |
| `weekDayOccurredAt` | `Int!` | The week day at which the message arrived in Ink. |

## Type `InvalidatePaymentInstruction`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Invalidates a payment instruction.

- KT-CT-1113: Disabled GraphQL field requested.
- KT-CT-1111: Unauthorized.
- KT-CT-1112: 'Authorization' header not provided.

|---|---:|---|

Please use the 'possibleErrors' query or the 'X-Kraken-Possible-Errors' header instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2025-01-31. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-03-01. |
| `instruction` | `InvalidatePaymentInstructionOutput` |  |

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Output for invalidating an arbitrary payment instruction.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `id` | `Int` |  |

## Type `InvalidatePreSignedToken`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Invalidate a previously issued expiring/pre-signed token.

This mutation can be used to invalidate the token itself.

To invalidate tokens issued to a particular user, use
InvalidatePreSignedTokensForUser mutation.

The possible errors that can be raised are:

- KT-CT-1129: Unauthorized.
- KT-CT-1113: Disabled GraphQL field requested.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `possibleErrors` | `[PossibleErrorType]` | Field with the possible errors of the query/mutation. Deprecated: The 'possibleErrors' field is deprecated. Please use the 'possibleErrors' query or the 'X-Kraken-Possible-Errors' header instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2025-01-31. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-03-01. |
| `token` | `PreSignedToken` |  |

## Type `InvalidatePreSignedTokensForUser`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Invalidate pre-signed tokens previously issued to a particular user.

This mutation can invalidate all pre-signed tokens issued to a
customer, or only tokens of a given scope.

The possible errors that can be raised are:

- KT-CT-1129: Unauthorized.
- KT-CT-1113: Disabled GraphQL field requested.
- KT-CT-1111: Unauthorized.
- KT-CT-1112: 'Authorization' header not provided.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `possibleErrors` | `[PossibleErrorType]` | Field with the possible errors of the query/mutation. Deprecated: The 'possibleErrors' field is deprecated. Please use the 'possibleErrors' query or the 'X-Kraken-Possible-Errors' header instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2025-01-31. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-03-01. |
| `tokens` | `[PreSignedToken]` |  |

## Type `InvalidateRefreshToken`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Invalidate a previously issued refresh token.

This mutation can be used to invalidate the token itself.  To
invalidate tokens issued to a particular user, use
InvalidateRefreshTokensForUser.

The possible errors that can be raised are:

- KT-CT-1130: Unauthorized.
- KT-CT-1113: Disabled GraphQL field requested.
- KT-CT-1111: Unauthorized.
- KT-CT-1112: 'Authorization' header not provided.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `possibleErrors` | `[PossibleErrorType]` | Field with the possible errors of the query/mutation. Deprecated: The 'possibleErrors' field is deprecated. Please use the 'possibleErrors' query or the 'X-Kraken-Possible-Errors' header instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2025-01-31. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-03-01. |
| `token` | `RefreshToken` |  |

## Type `InvalidateRefreshTokensForUser`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Invalidate refresh tokens previously issued to a particular user.

This mutation will invalidate all refresh tokens issued to a
customer.

The possible errors that can be raised are:

- KT-CT-1128: Unauthorized.
- KT-CT-1113: Disabled GraphQL field requested.
- KT-CT-1111: Unauthorized.
- KT-CT-1112: 'Authorization' header not provided.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `possibleErrors` | `[PossibleErrorType]` | Field with the possible errors of the query/mutation. Deprecated: The 'possibleErrors' field is deprecated. Please use the 'possibleErrors' query or the 'X-Kraken-Possible-Errors' header instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2025-01-31. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-03-01. |
| `tokens` | `[RefreshToken]` |  |

## Type `InvoiceBillingDocumentConnectionTypeConnection`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

An invoice is a bill that contains individual transactions  (i.e. charges, credits, payments, and repayments). These may come from any period of time.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `pageInfo` | `PageInfo!` | Pagination data for this connection. |
| `edges` | `[InvoiceBillingDocumentConnectionTypeEdge]!` | Contains the nodes in this connection. |
| `totalCount` | `Int!` | Total number of nodes. |
| `edgeCount` | `Int!` | Number of nodes in the edge. |

## Type `InvoiceBillingDocumentConnectionTypeEdge`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

A Relay edge containing a `InvoiceBillingDocumentConnectionType` and its cursor.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `node` | `InvoiceBillingDocumentType` | The item at the end of the edge |
| `cursor` | `String!` | A cursor for use in pagination |

## Type `InvoiceBillingDocumentType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

An invoice is a bill that contains individual transactions  (i.e. charges, credits, payments, and repayments). These may come from any period of time.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `id` | `Int` | Unique identifier for the invoice billing document. |
| `firstIssued` | `DateTime` | First time the invoice was issued. |
| `pdfUrl` | `String` | URL to the PDF of the Invoice. |
| `annulledBy` | `AnnulmentBillingDocumentType` | Billing document that annuls this invoice. |
| `number` | `String` | The unique billing document's reference that can be used for identifying it externally. |
| `invoicedAmount` | `Int` | The invoiced amount of the billing document. |
| `totalCharges` | `InvoiceTotalType` | The total amounts for all charges on the invoice. |
| `totalCredits` | `InvoiceTotalType` | The total amounts for all credits on the invoice. |
| `transactions(orderBy: TransactionsOrderBy, before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `BillTransactionConnectionTypeConnection` | Transactions on the invoice |
| `documentDebtPosition` | `BillingDocumentPositionType` | Position of the billing document in the delinquent debt tracking system. |
| `paymentDueDate` | `Date` | The date due for payment for the invoice. |

### Field arguments

#### `transactions`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `orderBy` | `TransactionsOrderBy` | The order in which to return the transactions. Default: `POSTED_DATE_DESC`. |
| `before` | `String` |  |
| `after` | `String` |  |
| `first` | `Int` |  |
| `last` | `Int` |  |

## Type `InvoiceTotalType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `netTotal` | `Int` | The net total amount for the statement (in minor currency units). |
| `taxTotal` | `Int` | The total amount of tax on the statement (in minor currency units). |
| `grossTotal` | `Int` | The gross total amount for the statement (in minor currency units). |

## Type `InvoiceType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

**Implements:** `BillInterface`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `id` | `ID` | The ID of the bill. |
| `billType` | `BillTypeEnum` | The type of the bill. |
| `fromDate` | `Date` | The date of the bill is covered from. |
| `toDate` | `Date` | The date of the bill is covered to. |
| `temporaryUrl` | `String` | Requesting this field generates a temporary URL at which bill is available. This URL will expire after approximately an hour. It is intended for redirection purposes, NOT persistence in any form (e.g. inclusion in emails or the body of a web page). This field can raise an error with errorClass NOT_FOUND if the bill document has not been created/issued yet. This field is deprecated use 'attachments' field instead. Deprecated: The 'temporaryUrl' field is deprecated. This field is deprecated. Use the 'attachments' field instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2024-09-16. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-09-01. |
| `issuedDate` | `Date` | The date the bill was sent to the customer. |
| `attachments(before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `BillingAttachmentConnectionTypeConnection` |  |
| `reversalsAfterClose` | `StatementReversalsAfterClose!` | How many charges have been reversed after the close date. |
| `identifier` | `String` | The unique identifier of a bill. It will usually be present on the billing document itself. Note: a bill that hasn't been issued yet will not have an identifier; and not all issued bills will have an identifier assigned to them, in which case this will be null. |
| `grossAmount` | `Int` | This field returns the total gross amount of the bill in pence. |
| `isAnnulled` | `Boolean!` | Whether the billing document has been annulled. |
| `totalCharges` | `InvoiceTotalType` | The total amounts for all charges on the invoice. |
| `totalCredits` | `InvoiceTotalType` | The total amounts for all credits on the invoice. |
| `totalPayments` | `Int` | The sum of all previous payments made that are included towards this invoice. |
| `transactions(ledgerNumber: String, transactionTypes: [TransactionTypeFilter], orderBy: TransactionsOrderBy, before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `BillTransactionConnectionTypeConnection` | Transactions on the given billing document. |
| `representations(code: String, before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `BillRepresentationConnectionTypeConnection` |  |

### Field arguments

#### `attachments`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `before` | `String` |  |
| `after` | `String` |  |
| `first` | `Int` |  |
| `last` | `Int` |  |

#### `transactions`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `ledgerNumber` | `String` | When provided, only entries that are linked to that ledger are returned. Default: `null`. |
| `transactionTypes` | `[TransactionTypeFilter]` | Include only these specific transaction types in the result. Default: `[]`. |
| `orderBy` | `TransactionsOrderBy` | The order in which to return the transactions. Default: `POSTED_DATE_DESC`. |
| `before` | `String` |  |
| `after` | `String` |  |
| `first` | `Int` |  |
| `last` | `Int` |  |

#### `representations`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `code` | `String` | The code of a representation. Used to identify different types of representations. Default: `null`. |
| `before` | `String` |  |
| `after` | `String` |  |
| `first` | `Int` |  |
| `last` | `Int` |  |

## Type `JoinSupplierAcceptTermsAndConditions`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

The possible errors that can be raised are:

- KT-CT-1111: Unauthorized.
- KT-CT-4501: Unauthorized.
- KT-CT-1113: Disabled GraphQL field requested.
- KT-CT-1112: 'Authorization' header not provided.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `possibleErrors` | `[PossibleErrorType]` | Field with the possible errors of the query/mutation. Deprecated: The 'possibleErrors' field is deprecated. Please use the 'possibleErrors' query or the 'X-Kraken-Possible-Errors' header instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2025-01-31. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-03-01. |
| `success` | `Boolean` | Indicator that the mutation has completed successfully. |

## Type `JoinSupplierLedgerAssignmentType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

A ledger with its associated supply points.

Multiple supply points may be assigned to the same ledger.
This type groups them for convenient querying.

| `ledgerNumber` | `String` | The ledger number. |

| `ledgerName` | `String` | The ledger name. |
| `ledgerSupplyPoints` | `[LedgerSupplyPointType]` | The supply points associated with the ledger. |

## Type `Lead`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `number` | `String!` | Lead number. |
| `nationalId` | `String` | National Identifier of the lead. |
| `leadType` | `String` | The type of the lead. |
| `salesFunnel` | `SalesFunnel` | The sales funnel this lead is in. |
| `stage` | `SalesFunnelStage` | The current stage of the sales funnel that this lead is in. |
| `salesChannel` | `SalesChannelType` | The sales channel that this lead was captured by. Deprecated: The 'salesChannel' field is deprecated. Sales channel information is being removed from the Lead model. This is information is saved in the Opportunity. - Marked as deprecated on 2025-06-17. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-10-17. |
| `assignedToOrganization` | `AffiliateOrganisationType` | Affiliate organization assigned to this lead. Deprecated: The 'assignedToOrganization' field is deprecated. Please use 'assignedToTeamIdentifier' instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2026-05-07. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2026-07-07. |
| `assignedToUsername` | `String` | The username of the user the lead is assigned to. Deprecated: The 'assignedToUsername' field is deprecated. Please use 'assignedToUserIdentifier' instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2026-04-22. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2026-06-22. |
| `assignedToUserIdentifier` | `String` | The identifier of the user the lead is assigned to. Deprecated: The 'assignedToUserIdentifier' field is deprecated. Lead-level assignment is being removed. Assignment is managed at Opportunity level. - Marked as deprecated on 2026-05-19. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2026-07-19. |
| `assignedToTeamIdentifier` | `String` | The identifier of the team the lead is assigned to. Deprecated: The 'assignedToTeamIdentifier' field is deprecated. Lead-level assignment is being removed. Assignment is managed at Opportunity level. - Marked as deprecated on 2026-05-19. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2026-07-19. |
| `consents` | `[ConsentOutput]` | List of consents for the lead. |
| `opportunities(input: OpportunitiesQueryInput)` | `[OpportunityOutput]` | List of opportunities for the lead. |
| `contacts(input: LeadContactDetailsFiltersInput)` | `[LeadContactDetailsType]` | The contacts for the lead. |

#### `opportunities`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `input` | `OpportunitiesQueryInput` | Input fields for retrieving opportunities. |

#### `contacts`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `input` | `LeadContactDetailsFiltersInput` | Input fields for retrieving contacts. |

Assignment is managed at Opportunity level. - Marked as deprecated on 2026-05-19. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2026-07-19. |

## Type `LeaveSupplierProcessType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Represents a Leave Supplier process. Conceptually, it contains information related to supply points that are associated with a Leave Supplier journey.

**Implements:** `AbstractSupplyPointProcessInterface`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `id` | `ID` | The ID or the primary key of the lifecycle process. |
| `status` | `LifecycleSupplyPointProcessStatus` | The status of the process. |
| `number` | `String` | The unique identifier of the process. |
| `supplyPoints(before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `SupplyPointConnectionTypeConnection!` | The supply points associated with the process. |
| `subtype` | `String` | The subtype of the process. |
| `stage` | `String` | Current stage of the leave supplier journey. |
| `processData` | `LeaveSupplierProcessData` | Data associated with the Leave Supplier process. |

### Field arguments

#### `supplyPoints`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `before` | `String` |  |
| `after` | `String` |  |
| `first` | `Int` |  |
| `last` | `Int` |  |

## Type `LeaveSupplierReversed`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Output of a LeaveSupplier journey reversal.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `message` | `String!` | The message to display to the user on reversal. |

## Type `LeaveSupplierUpdated`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Leave supplier was successfully updated.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `message` | `String!` | The message to display to the user on leave supplier update. |

## Type `LedgerDebtPositionType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `ledgerNumber` | `String!` | The ledger number. |
| `delinquentDebtAmount` | `Int` | The total amount of delinquent debt for this ledger (in minor currency units, e.g. pence/cents). A value of 0 means the ledger has no delinquent debt. Null if the status is not OK. |
| `status` | `LedgerDebtPositionStatus!` | The status of the debt position for this ledger. OK means the delinquent_debt_amount is available and accurate. UNAVAILABLE means the position could not be determined. |

## Type `LedgerSupplyPointType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `externalIdentifier` | `String` | Supply point external identifier. Empty string if not set. |
| `marketName` | `String` | Market name for the supply point. |

## Type `LedgerType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Ledgers provide the foundation of Kraken’s bookkeeping functionality. Similar to a bank account, they allow us to keep track of financial activity on a particular Kraken account.

**Implements:** `LedgerInterface`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `id` | `ID` |  Deprecated: The 'ledgerId' field is deprecated. Please use 'ledgerNumber' instead. This is in the form of 'L-123456789A' - Marked as deprecated on 2024-10-22. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-06-25. |
| `name` | `String` | The display name of the ledger. |
| `number` | `String` | The canonical name of the ledger. |
| `ledgerType` | `String` | The ledger type code. |
| `balance` | `Int` | The current balance on the ledger in minor units of currency. |
| `amountOwedByCustomer` | `Int` | The amount owed from the customer perspective. A positive value implies the customer owes the business, while a negative amount implies the customer is in credit. |
| `affectsAccountBalance` | `Boolean` | Whether this ledger's balance contributes to the account's balance. |
| `statements(statementId: Int, orderBy: _BillingDocumentsOrderBy, before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `StatementBillingDocumentConnectionTypeConnection` | A statement is a billing document that contains all entries on a ledger during a period of time. A customer can understand how their ledger's balance has changed by looking at each statement in series. |
| `invoices(invoiceId: Int, orderBy: _BillingDocumentsOrderBy, excludeExternallyIssued: Boolean, before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `InvoiceBillingDocumentConnectionTypeConnection` | An invoice is a bill that contains individual transactions (i.e. charges, credits, payments, and repayments). These may come from any period of time. |
| `transactions(transactionTypes: [TransactionTypeFilter], fromDate: Date, toDate: Date, orderBy: TransactionsOrderBy, before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `TransactionConnectionTypeConnection` | Transactions on the given ledger. |
| `repaymentRequests(before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `RepaymentRequestConnectionTypeConnection` | Repayment requests for a given ledger. |
| `refundRequests(before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `RefundRequestConnectionTypeConnection` | Refund requests for a given ledger. |
| `acceptsPayments` | `Boolean` | Whether payments can be posted onto this ledger. |
| `paymentAdequacy` | `PaymentAdequacyDetailsType` |  |
| `creditTransferPermissionsData` | `CreditTransferPermissionsDataType` | Permissions data for credit transfers involving the given ledger. |
| `paymentPreferences(before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `PaymentPreferenceConnectionTypeConnection` | The customer's preferred payment methods. |
| `paymentPreferenceAtTime(atTime: DateTime!)` | `PaymentPreferenceUnion` | The customer's preferred payment method at a point in time. The possible errors that can be raised are: - KT-CT-3976: The ledger has no configured payment preference. - KT-CT-3977: Ledger was not accepting payments at this time. - KT-CT-1113: Disabled GraphQL field requested. |
| `debtLedger` | `LedgerType` | The debt ledger assigned to this ledger. |
| `agreements(before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `AgreementConnection` | The charged supply agreements of the ledger. |
| `usablePaymentInstructions(usableAt: DateTime, before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `PaymentInstructionConnectionTypeConnection` | The usable payment instructions for this ledger. |
| `billingTriggerConfiguration` | `BillingTriggerConfiguration` | The active billing trigger configuration for the ledger. The possible errors that can be raised are: - KT-CT-9709: Billing trigger configuration only supports SupplementaryLedger type. - KT-CT-1113: Disabled GraphQL field requested. |
| `supportsStatements` | `Boolean` | Is it possible for this ledger to contain statements. |
| `supportsInvoices` | `Boolean` | Is it possible for this ledger to contain invoices. |
| `currentDirectDebitInstructionInvalidatedWithVendor` | `Boolean` | True if the current direct debit instruction has been invalidated by vendor. False otherwise. |
| `paymentsWithNonConcludedRePresentation(before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `PaymentWithNonConcludedRePresentationConnectionTypeConnection` | Payments with non-concluded re-presentation. |

### Field arguments

#### `statements`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `statementId` | `Int` | The id of billing document. |
| `orderBy` | `_BillingDocumentsOrderBy` | The order the statements should be returned in. |
| `before` | `String` |  |
| `after` | `String` |  |
| `first` | `Int` |  |
| `last` | `Int` |  |

#### `invoices`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `invoiceId` | `Int` | The id of the invoice. |
| `orderBy` | `_BillingDocumentsOrderBy` | The order the invoices should be returned in. |
| `excludeExternallyIssued` | `Boolean` | Exclude invoices that were issued by external systems. Does not apply to legacy bills. Default: `false`. |
| `before` | `String` |  |
| `after` | `String` |  |
| `first` | `Int` |  |
| `last` | `Int` |  |

#### `transactions`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `transactionTypes` | `[TransactionTypeFilter]` | Include only these specific transaction types in the result. Default: `[]`. |
| `fromDate` | `Date` | Optional date representing the beginning of the postedDate range filter. This date value is inclusive. |
| `toDate` | `Date` | Optional date representing the end of the postedDate range filter. This date value is exclusive. |
| `orderBy` | `TransactionsOrderBy` | The order in which to return the transactions. Default: `POSTED_DATE_DESC`. |
| `before` | `String` |  |
| `after` | `String` |  |
| `first` | `Int` |  |
| `last` | `Int` |  |

#### `repaymentRequests`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `before` | `String` |  |
| `after` | `String` |  |
| `first` | `Int` |  |
| `last` | `Int` |  |

#### `refundRequests`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `before` | `String` |  |
| `after` | `String` |  |
| `first` | `Int` |  |
| `last` | `Int` |  |

#### `paymentPreferences`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `before` | `String` |  |
| `after` | `String` |  |
| `first` | `Int` |  |
| `last` | `Int` |  |

#### `paymentPreferenceAtTime`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `atTime` | `DateTime!` | The time at which to know the payment preference. |

#### `agreements`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `before` | `String` |  |
| `after` | `String` |  |
| `first` | `Int` |  |
| `last` | `Int` |  |

#### `usablePaymentInstructions`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `usableAt` | `DateTime` | The time at which the payment instructions should be usable. |
| `before` | `String` |  |
| `after` | `String` |  |
| `first` | `Int` |  |
| `last` | `Int` |  |

#### `paymentsWithNonConcludedRePresentation`

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `before` | `String` |  |
| `after` | `String` |  |
| `first` | `Int` |  |
| `last` | `Int` |  |

## Type `LegacyItemProfileType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Represents the characteristics and configuration of an ordered item.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `characteristics` | `JSONString` | The characteristic values for this item profile. |

## Type `LegacyOrderDetailsType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Represents the details of an `Order`.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `order` | `LegacyOrderType` | The order details. The possible errors that can be raised are: - KT-CT-13101: Order not found. - KT-CT-1113: Disabled GraphQL field requested. |
| `status` | `OrderStatus` | The current status of the order. The possible errors that can be raised are: - KT-CT-13101: Order not found. - KT-CT-1113: Disabled GraphQL field requested. |
| `resources` | `[LegacyOrderResource]` | The resources associated with the order. The possible errors that can be raised are: - KT-CT-13101: Order not found. - KT-CT-1113: Disabled GraphQL field requested. |

## Type `LegacyOrderItemType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Represents an item being ordered.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `profile` | `LegacyItemProfileType` | The profile containing characteristics of the item. |
| `marketData` | `JSONString` | Market-specific data for the item. |
| `code` | `NonEmptyString` | The code identifying the item. |

## Type `LegacyOrderLineDateRangeType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Represents a period defined by specific start and end dates.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `start` | `DateTime!` | The start date and time of the period. |
| `end` | `DateTime` | The end date and time of the period. Null indicates an infinite/rolling period. |

## Type `LegacyOrderLineDurationType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Represents a period defined by duration in seconds.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `duration` | `Float!` | The duration in seconds. |

## Type `LegacyOrderLineType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Represents a line item in an order.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `item` | `LegacyOrderItemType` | The item being ordered. |
| `period` | `LegacyOrderLinePeriodType` | The period for which this order line is valid. Can be a range or a duration. |
| `target` | `Account` | The target customer for this order line. |
| `terms` | `[TermInterface]` | The terms applicable to this order line. |

## Type `LegacyOrderResource`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Represents a resource associated with an order.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `resourceType` | `NonEmptyString` | The type of the resource. |
| `resourceIdentifier` | `NonEmptyString` | The unique identifier of the resource. |

## Type `LegacyOrderType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Represents an order in the system.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `identifier` | `NonEmptyString` | Unique identifier for the order. |
| `customer` | `LegacyOrderCustomerType` | The customer who placed the order. |
| `lines` | `[LegacyOrderLineType]` | The order lines in this order. |
| `orderedAt` | `DateTime` | The date and time when the order was placed. |
| `terms` | `[TermInterface]` | The terms applicable to this order. |
| `sale` | `SalesRecordType` | The sales record associated with this order, if any. |
| `source` | `String` | The source offering that generated this order. |

## Type `LegacyProcessOrderOutput`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Output type for the result of processing an order.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `status` | `OrderStatus` | The status of the order processing. |
| `identifier` | `NonEmptyString` | The unique identifier of the processed order. |
| `resources` | `[LegacyOrderResource!]` | The resources associated with the processed order. |

## Type `LineItemType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `supplyType` | `String` | The type of charge. Based on Product Rates registered in the support site. Will resolve to JPN_{MARKET}_{RATE_NAME}, for example JPN_ELECTRICITY_CONSUMPTION_STEPPED_03_01. |
| `periodStartAt` | `DateTime` | The start of the period the charge covers. |
| `periodEndAt` | `DateTime` | The end of the period the charge covers. |
| `numberOfUnits` | `Decimal` | The supplied quantity. |
| `netAmount` | `Decimal` | The net amount charged. |
| `grossAmount` | `Decimal` | The gross amount charged. |
| `currency` | `String` | The currency of the charge. |
| `productCode` | `String` | The product code of the charge. |
| `electricitySupplyPoint` | `ElectricitySupplyPoint` | The electricity supply point of the charge. |
| `gasSupplyPoint` | `GasSupplyPoint` | The gas supply point of the charge. |
| `contractedCapacityUnit` | `String` | The unit of the contracted capacity, e.g. 'kVA', 'kW', or 'A'. |
| `contractedCapacityValue` | `Decimal` | The value of the contracted capacity, e.g. '30'. |

## Type `LinkAccountToBusiness`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

The possible errors that can be raised are:

- KT-CT-1111: Unauthorized.
- KT-CT-11104: Business role already allocated.
- KT-CT-11105: Business role already allocated.
- KT-CT-11106: Unauthorized.
- KT-CT-11107: Unauthorized.
- KT-CT-1113: Disabled GraphQL field requested.
- KT-CT-1112: 'Authorization' header not provided.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `possibleErrors` | `[PossibleErrorType]` | Field with the possible errors of the query/mutation. Deprecated: The 'possibleErrors' field is deprecated. Please use the 'possibleErrors' query or the 'X-Kraken-Possible-Errors' header instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2025-01-31. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-03-01. |
| `business` | `BusinessType` | The business the account was linked to. |

## Type `LinkActionType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

An action which navigates to any URL.

**Implements:** `ActionInterface`, `IdentifiableInterface`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `typeName` | `String` | The name of the action object's type. |
| `id` | `ID` | Unique identifier of the object. |
| `typename` | `String` | The name of the object's type. |
| `url` | `String!` | The URL to navigate to. |

## Type `LinkRakutenIdToAccountUser`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Mutation to link Rakuten OpenID to AccountUser.

The possible errors that can be raised are:

- KT-JP-5403: Invalid input data for linking Rakuten OpenID to account user.
- KT-JP-5404: Rakuten OpenID linkage for this account user already exists.
- KT-JP-5405: An unexpected error occurred while attempting to link Rakuten OpenID to account user.
- KT-CT-1113: Disabled GraphQL field requested.
- KT-CT-1111: Unauthorized.
- KT-CT-1112: 'Authorization' header not provided.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `possibleErrors` | `[PossibleErrorType]` | Field with the possible errors of the query/mutation. Deprecated: The 'possibleErrors' field is deprecated. Please use the 'possibleErrors' query or the 'X-Kraken-Possible-Errors' header instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2025-01-31. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-03-01. |
| `status` | `String!` | The ID linkage status. |

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Returned when no LineAccountLink record matching the parameters exists.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `type` | `LineLinkErrorType!` | The type of error that occurred. |

## Type `LivePaymentAdequacyCalculation`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `suggestedNewMonthlyAmount` | `Int` | The suggested monthly payment amount in minor currency following the payment adequacy review. |
| `consumption(before: String, after: String, first: Int, last: Int)` | `ConsumptionBreakdownConnectionTypeConnection` | Breakdown of customer's estimated or real usage per market and per month. |
| `averageMonthlyCharge` | `Int` | The combined average montly cost for all markets based on usage. |
| `existingMonthlyAmount` | `Int` | The amount the customer is paying monthly at the time of the review. |
| `balanceAdjustment` | `Int` | Suggested temporary adjustment to ongoing usage amount to cover debt or overpayment. |
| `currentBalance` | `Int` | The balance the ledger has at the time of review. |
| `targetBalance` | `Int` | The balance we expect the ledger to have at the end period of the review. |
| `reviewedOn` | `Date` | The date that we used to calculate the review of the ledger. |

| Argument | Type | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `before` | `String` |  |
| `after` | `String` |  |
| `first` | `Int` |  |
| `last` | `Int` |  |

## Type `LoyaltyCardType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

A loyalty card.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `id` | `ID!` |  |
| `scheme` | `String` | The scheme of the loyalty card. |
| `number` | `String` | The number of the loyalty card. |

## Type `LoyaltyPointLedgerEntryType`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

A Loyalty Point ledger entry.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `id` | `ID!` |  |
| `ledgerType` | `String` | The `LedgerEntryType`. Either CHARGE or CREDIT. |
| `value` | `String` | The value of the charge or credit. |
| `balanceBroughtForward` | `String` | Equal to the `balance_carried_forward` from the previous ledger entry or zero if this is the first one. |
| `balanceCarriedForward` | `String` | Equal to the `balance_brought_forward` plus or minus the value depending on the ledger_type. |
| `reasonCode` | `String` | The reason the entry was being added. |
| `idempotencyKey` | `UUID` | A unique idempotency key for the operation. |
| `postedAt` | `DateTime` | The date the points were added to the ledger. |
| `accountNumber` | `String` | The account number associated with the entry. |

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `isEligible` | `Boolean` | Whether the account is eligible to join the loyalty points program. |
| `primaryIneligibilityReason` | `String` | The primary reason for ineligibility, if any. |

## Type `MarkPrintBatchAsProcessed`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Mark a closed print batch as Processed

The possible errors that can be raised are:

- KT-CT-9011: Invalid data.
- KT-CT-1113: Disabled GraphQL field requested.
- KT-CT-1111: Unauthorized.
- KT-CT-1112: 'Authorization' header not provided.

| Field | Returns | Description |

Please use the 'possibleErrors' query or the 'X-Kraken-Possible-Errors' header instead. - Marked as deprecated on 2025-01-31. - Scheduled for removal on or after 2025-03-01. |
| `printBatch` | `PrintBatchType` |  |

## Type `ModelYearRange`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Range of model years supported for a device model.

If end year is null, all years after start year are supported.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `startYear` | `Int!` | Earliest year model is supported. |
| `endYear` | `Int` | Latest year model is supported. If null, all years after start year are supported. |

## Type `MoveInDateInvalid`

Returned when a supplied move in date is invalid

| `endDate` | `Date!` | The last day that a customer may request a move in. |

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|

## Type `MoveInSuccess`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Returned upon a successful Move In request.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `accountNumber` | `String!` | Kraken account number. |
| `token` | `String` | Kraken token. |
| `userId` | `String` | Kraken user id. |
| `hasUsablePassword` | `Boolean!` | Indicates if the user has a usable password and can log in immediately. |
| `hashedAccountApplicationId` | `String` | Hashed account application ID. |

## Type `MoveOutAndMoveInInitiated`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

MoveOut was successfully initiated.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `accountNumber` | `String!` | The account number for the newly created account for the property the customer is moving in to. |
| `token` | `String` |  |
| `message` | `String!` | The message to display to the user on move out and move in initiation. |
| `hasUsablePassword` | `Boolean!` | Indicates if the user has a usable password and can log in immediately. |

## Type `MoveOutDateInvalid`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

Returned when a supplied move out date is outside of the OCCTO accepted range

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `message` | `String!` | The error message to display to the user. |
| `field` | `String` | The field that for which this error should be associated. |
| `startDate` | `Date!` | The first day that a customer may request a move out. Always today. |
| `endDate` | `Date!` | The last day that a customer may request a move out. Always today + 31 days. |

## Type `MoveOutInitiated`

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

MoveOut was successfully initiated.

| Field | Returns | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `message` | `String!` | The message to display to the user on move out initiation. |

**Kind:** `OBJECT`

|---|---:|---|
